About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
reviewText: Dont buy this product if you plan on using it more than once. Actually, just don't waste your money on this at all. The hinges on ours broke off the first time we used it and the only way we could fix it was by putting one back on sideways making it impossible to open all the way and replacement hinges won't stay in. The handle broke off when we were moving it. We did tons of research to figure out the best cooler for us and landed on this one. BIG MISTAKE. Now we have a broken piece of junk thats barely holding together and were out over $100 dollars! We were really hoping that spending more money and buying a Coleman product would be worth it. This product is just disappointing and cheaply made.

title: Coleman Oak Point Cool-Weather Big and Tall Sleeping Bag
description: Stay comfortable during chilly nights outdoors with the Coleman Oak Point Cool-Weather Big and Tall Sleeping Bag. This lightweight sleeping bag has heat-locking construction with a polyester cover, Coletherm insulation, and a soft cotton flannel lining to keep you warm in temperatures as low as 30F. Fiberlock construction keeps the insulation from shifting, reducing cold spots and increasing durability. For additional warmth, a Thermolock draft tube helps prevent heat from escaping through the zipper. The 2-way patented ZipPlow system plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. And thanks to its Roll Control design and Quick Cord patented no-tie closure, this backpacking sleeping bag is easy for one person to pack without assistance. This adult sleeping bag can accommodate most people up to 6 feet 4 inches tall and is machine washable for easy cleaning.
reviewText: Needs more filling for posted temps and needs a collar or drawer string at the neck to cut drafts

title: Coleman Dunnock Cold Weather Adult Sleeping Bag
description: Ideal for camping at higher altitudes or in cooler months, the Coleman Dunnock Cold-Weather Sleeping Bag helps you sleep comfortably in temperatures as low as 20F. This sleeping bag features Fiberlock construction that keeps the insulation from shifting, reducing cold spots and increasing durability. A cotton cover and ultra-soft cotton flannel liner also keep you warm, as well as a Thermolock draft tube that prevents heat loss through the zipper. The bottom of the bag unzips to provide extra ventilation on warmer nights. The 2-way patented ZipPlow system plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. Plus, the Roll Control design and Wrap 'N' Roll integrated packing system make this lightweight backpacking sleeping bag easy to roll and pack. This sleeping bag has a spacious design that can accommodate most people up to 5 feet 11 inches tall and is machine washable for easy cleaning.
reviewText: I wish they would be a bit more descriptive in their descriptions of these.  This has the cotton feel exterior and interior.  i was hoping for the silky, smooth, polyester.

title: Coleman Beach Shade
description: " Take your own shady, private space to the beach or park with the Coleman Beach Shade. This pop-up beach tent is made with UVGuard material that offers 50+ UPF protection from the suns harmful rays and durable Polyguard material that is designed to last season after season. The extended floor can be zipped shut for privacy while changing clothes, and the dry line offers a convenient place to hang wet bathing suits and towels. Integrated storage pockets give you a secure place to put your items while you swim or sunbathe. And when it gets hot, the back window can be unzipped to let the breeze in, while the sand bag compartments can be filled as needed to anchor the beach canopy on windy days. The Coleman Beach Shade comes with ground stakes and pre-attached guy lines and can be set up in about five minutes.
reviewText:
It is OK once it is put together but it is one pain in the neck to put up.
The sand bag idea was not thought out. It needs to be secure to the ground before you can even start thinking about erecting it. We had a hard time with it using the stakes into dirt so I know it would not be fun putting up on the beach. We wound up ordering another tent. I wish I could return it.
UPDATE 2013 !!!!! We had this tent for a couple a years now and never used it again so we gave it to my Daughter to try and use it on the beach for her two small girls. She could not put it together and gave it back to us.
We would not recommend it and wish we never bought this wast of money tent. ( We hope Coleman reads this and discontinues it )
Brian Cianfrani

title: Coleman RoadTrip LXX Portable Propane Grill, Black
description: Show off your grilling skills on camping trips or at tailgate parties with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Portable Propane Grill. This outdoor grill combines a collapsible, portable design with convenient features that facilitate grilling in tough conditions. The grill's individually adjustable dual burners each blast out 10,000 BTUs of heat, giving you enough cooking power to prepare a wide range of foods, from grilled veggies to thick slabs of steak. The Swaptop interchangeable design allows you to switch out the grill grates for a griddle top or stove grate (both sold separately), while the Instastart ignition lets you light the burners by simply pushing a button. Ideal for summer cookouts, this portable gas grill also excels in chilly conditions thanks to PerfectFlow technology, which helps ensure steady heat output. Sliding tables on both sides of the grill provide easy access to ingredients and utensils and can be tucked away for easy transport and storage. With its 285-square-inch cooktop, this grill offers a large cooking surface area without sacrificing portability. Its collapsible stand sets up in seconds and folds up for compact storage, while its large handle and wheels make the grill easy to transport. And thanks to its porcelain-coated cast iron grates and removable grease tray, this camp grill is easy to clean.
reviewText: The first time using the grill it worked great. The second time I tried to use it the burner I cooked over the FIRST time would no longer ignite on its own! Due to Chicago winters I wasn't able to figure all this out before the return window ended

title: Coleman 12 oz. Enamel Mug
description: Grab a refreshing drink at the campsite, BBQ or picnic with an impact-resistant Coleman 12 oz. Enamel Mug. Each lightweight, steel bowl is dishwasher-safe and coated in a durable, classic blue speckled enamel finish. They also feature rolled rims for sipping comfort.
reviewText: I bought two of these for my boys for Christmas to use on scouting events.  Both cups came with the enamel chipped off in various places, and sitting in the bottom of the cup.  The cups are also fairly small. VERY disappointed with this purchase.

title: Coleman Camping Instant Signal Mountain Tent
reviewText:
This is a huge tent that after you get the hang of it, goes up pretty easily. It's just that first time you do it the instructions aren't very good or is the process very intuitive.  That said here are the pros and cons of this tent as I see them.

Pros:
* Goes up quickly. After getting the hang of it that is.
* No poles to have to fold/unfold and keep track up.
* Guy lines are pre-attached.
* Tent floor is heavier duty tarp material obviating the need for a separate tarp.
* Big windows
* Two tent pockets inside tent
* Nice color scheme, though obviously a personal opinion.
* No rainfly required. (more on this below)
* Carrying/packing bag includes handles and tension buckles.

Cons:
* Seems to be some quality control issues.  My tent came with one of the corners misassembled at one of the bottom corners.  It was an easy fix to untangle the tent once I figured out what was going on.  Other posters have posted similar fixable but missed QC issues.
* More QC issues.  There seems to be some alignment issues with some of the window panels as they zipper really pulls against the stitching in a few spots.  I'm pretty sure this won't last long.
* No rainfly included.  Yes, you don't have to mess with installing a separate rainfly but you also can't open the windows if it's raining or you are planning on it raining.  There is a ventilation flap at one end of the tent and you could open the door at the top to mesh to get some cross-draft going but ventilation is seriously limited in this regard.
* Straps go through the tent at the corners.  Strangely the tent strap go through a flap at each corner into the tent leaving small bug entry paths into the tent.  My kids point them out when they went back into the tent and there were a few fruit flys on the inside.

To be determined:
* Like some other users, the tent poles collapsed a couple times on my kids when they were playing in the tent. When I went to inspect the poles they seemed quite sturdy.  Not sure if it was an issue of not seating them properly the first time or not.

Summary:
This is a big, airy (when it's not raining) tent that's easy to set up and take down but seems to suffer from a couple odd design choices and some random quality control.

Advice on usage:
Don't close up the windows when packing the tent away as it keeps the air from escaping and makes the tent much more difficult to roll up.  Otherwise it rolls up fairly well and easily fits back into the carrying bag.

title: Coleman Camping Instant Signal Mountain Tent
reviewText:
Not so sure about this one. It was relatively easy to set up, thanks to the built in poles. My middle schooler did not have enough strength to clip in the clips though, despite being plenty strong. I like the way the instructions are sewn into the carry bag and printed on a waterproof material. The instructions were a bit off though, they told me to connect poles for the "rain tarp" that were already connected at the factory.

Speaking of which, the "rain tarp" is just a triangle that covers over the single door. If it was raining you would need to close all the other windows or you would get drenched. There is a little vent that is below the back window that has a rain cover (if you stake it out) but still  I can't imagine this being comfortable in a humid rainy situation.

I like the center ceiling mounted o-ring that will allow for a lantern to be hung. It has 2 sewn in patches for your wallet and phone and such which is nice.

Of course you know that take the # of people a tent says it can fit and divide by half to see what it will actually comfortably accommodate.

It has a "power port" a little zipper in the corner that opens and allows a cord to come in. Not sure I'd want A/C power coming into my tent in the rain - but this may also be useful to pass small items back and forth from the outside without having to open the whole door.

Folding up is kind of another issue. The instructions just say "reverse the setup procedure" but after all of the origami like movements you have to do, it's hard to remember what it looked like at the start and to get it back to a place where it fits in the bag. I'd easily say that the time I saved not having to take out the poles and fold them was eaten up by trying to figure out how to fold the thing and stuff it back in the carry bag. I suspect this would improve over time and with experience.

Also, the "1 minute" to set up is a bit disingenuous. Maybe if you really have your act together, but no way does this time include setting up all the necessary stakes for the tent corners and guy wires.

Overall, a great experience setting up, a little less so breaking down. Could prevent many family fights at the campsite ;-)

title: Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue
description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
reviewText: works for a while but spout breaks easily and cannot find replacement

description: Take your Coleman stove wherever outdoor adventures lead you with the Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium. Designed to fit Coleman 2-burner stoves measuring up to 21.5 x 14 x 4.8 inches, this rugged carry case made from PVC-coated polyester protects your stove during transportation and storage. Strong web handles provide comfort when toting stoves between campsites, while the durable zipper is designed to keep stoves safe and dry. Two propane pouches with drawstrings securely carry extra fuel canisters (sold separately).
reviewText: cheap

title: Coleman Camp Axe
description: Get the right tool for multiple jobs when you're at the campsite with the Coleman Camp Axe. The sharp edge of the durable drop-forged steel head easily splits wood for a campfire or stove, while the flat edge works wonders for driving tent stakes into hard ground. When it's time to pack up, pulling your tent stakes is easy with the notch cut into the head. Durable and well built, the Coleman Camp Axe is perfect for the campsite, wooded terrain, or the backyard. The axe is equipped with a drop-forged carbon-steel axe head that easily splits wood into kindling, along with a forged steel handle and an ergonomic nonslip grip. With the Coleman Camp Axe, you'll be ready for any camping contingency.
reviewText: It's cheap, but it really isn't worth it. The balance is poor, and the blade comes dull as a hammer. Spend the extra $10-15 and get a better hatchet.

title: Coleman CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge
description: Power all your Coleman CPX 6 gear with the Coleman CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge. This rechargeable battery kit allows you to make any Coleman CPX 6 product rechargeable, helping you save money on disposable batteries and minimize waste in landfills. Each kit includes a rechargeable battery, a 12-volt adapter for convenient vehicle recharging, and a 120-volt adapter for use with conventional AC outlets. Built to resist impacts and water, the battery features a rugged design and comes fitted with a rubber plug to protect against dirt and debris. It recharges quickly via either a vehicle or home outlet. And thanks to the power cartridge's charge indicator, you'll know exactly when the battery is fully charged.
reviewText: Battery pack gives good power for about 2-3 hours and then slowly starts to die out.  I also bought EBL rechargeable D batteries and they ran strong for 10 plus hours, I would invest your money in rechargeable D batteries.

title: Coleman Cooler Stainless Steel Hinges and Screws
description: For replacement on most Coleman Coolers with plastic hinges as well as Coleman steel Coolers made after 2000.
reviewText: The hinges are an excellent fit, and seem to be reasonably good quality.  The factory plastic hinges that Coleman uses are absolutely worthless, and I've had them snap apart on multiple coolers for multiple reasons.  These seem like they will last a while - will be especially interested in how they hold up in a salt air environment.  My only complaint is the price.  I got my cooler on sale (from Amazon); these hinges (from a third-party Amazon affiliate, I think) cost just under half the price of the cooler itself.

title: Coleman Tripod Grill and Lantern Hanger
description: Grill up dinner over the campfire and then tell stories by lantern light with help from the Coleman Tripod Grill and Lantern Hanger. Easily adjust the 17-in. diameter grill grate so it hangs over the fire at the perfect height for just the right amount of heat. When the meal is done, use the tripod to hang a lantern for just enough campsite light. When the fun is done, the shock-corded, durable galvanized steel legs collapse for convenient storage.
reviewText: This grill isn't made to be left over the fire.  Mother in-law had one last camping trip and liked it. So I ordered one.  I removed mine when not cooking and used it to hang a lantern.  Mother in-law said she warped hers but i belive that was do to over exposure to heat.  Other than some cooked on grease mine still looks new.  If taken care of this should last some time.

title: Coleman Portable Camping Quad Chair with 4-Can Cooler
description: Have a cold drink at hand at the campsite, BBQ or picnic with a Coleman Cooler Quad Chair. The cooler built into the armrest holds up to 4 cans and provides easy access to a cold drink once the one in your mesh cup holder is empty. While you sip on your favorite beverage, the fully cushioned seat and back only adds to your relaxation. If you want your hands free, the side pockets work nicely to store your book, magazine or some snacks. When the fun is done, the chair easily folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.
reviewText: Great chairs.

title: Coleman High Stand,20.25" H x 18.75" W x 28" L
description: Coleman 2000020280 High Stand. Camping Furniture. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping Furniture
reviewText: I will start by sayingthatI LOVE the Coleman brand. But this is trully a horrible grilling stand. First of all the rubber or whatever the black part melted within 15 minutes of using it. Also the stands is flimsy and will slide open. Now I might have gotten  a defected one but i doubt it.  It has no support and my  grill kept falling right out.  It is therefore very dangerous.  I really wanted to love it, as like I mentioned before I love the Coleman brand. 9y% of my camping equipment is from Coleman. But I can not recommend this stand to anyone.  I have 3 small children and I  jusy don't feel comfortable using it around them. . Or anyone for that matter. I wish we would have just put our money towards a more sturdy and bigger  fold up station to begin with. I took it to one 4 day camping trip came home put it away to maybe think of a different use. But it's been so long that honestly I'll probsbly end up throwing it away. I guess there's a first time for everything,  cause for the first time I'm dissapointed with this brand.

title: Coleman Folding Shovel with Pick
description: Coleman 2000016390 shovel folding w/pick. Camping knives & tools shovels. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping knives & tools shovels
reviewText: Sold but small

These glass lantern globes are transparent so they provide optimal illumination. These replacement glass globes should be used on your outdoor adventures or camping trips.

The motor cools contents down to 40 degrees F below the surrounding temperature, so you don't have to fret once the ice starts melting in your standard cooler. reviewText: The cooler needs supporting ice packs to cool to a safe refrigeration level. I keep an thermometer in it, and without ice support, it doesn't cool below 57 degrees - even when run all day.

title: Coleman 4-Person Instant Tent Rainfly Accessory
description: The Coleman 4-Person Instant Tent Rainfly Accessory lets you enjoy added protection from bad weather while increasing airflow inside your tent. Coleman tents are sealed strongly to prevent water from entering, which means campers can sometimes lose airflow when it starts to rain and they zip up the windows. Thats why this rainfly accessory is designed to fit over the top of 8- by 7-foot Coleman 4-Person Instant Tents (sold separately), providing added rain protection while giving you the ability to open windows without having to worry about rainwater getting inside.
reviewText: Wish I had read this question before purchasing. This rain fly does not fit the 4 person 59 inch tent.  I got soaked during my vacation. Amazon dropped the ball here should make the description clear which tent model it fits. Called for an exchange and was refused.

title: Coleman Instant Pop-Up Canopy Tent and Sun Shelter with LED Lighting, 10 x 10 Feet
description:
The Coleman Instant Pop-Up Canopy Tent and Sun Shelter with LED Lighting, 10 x 10 Feet, lets you enjoy the outdoors any time of day or night. Great for picnics, barbecues, campouts, and more, this sun shelter is made with UV Guard material that offers UPF 50+ protection from the sun's harmful rays. The lightweight telescoping poles with pinch-free Comfort Grip technology can be extended comfortably without having to reach over your head, allowing you to set up the canopy tent quickly. Once assembled, the canopy offers stable shelter on grass, concrete, and asphalt thanks to its welded steel feet. When the sun goes down, the fun can keep going thanks to the 6 built-in CPX LED lights that supply 400 lumens of illumination. The lighting system can be powered by 4 D-cell batteries or one CPX 6 rechargeable power cartridge (both sold separately). When its time to pack up, the shelter folds down quickly and fits easily inside most cars. Whether you're camping, dining in the backyard, or hosting a wedding reception, the Coleman Instant Canopy makes an ideal companion. The Instant Canopy is Coleman's most innovative canopy, with a three-step setup that takes three minutes or less to pitch.


The canopy is easy to set up via a 3-step, 3-minute process.
No more fiddling with hard-to-interpret pole assemblies or poorly designed attachment systems. More importantly, the canopy comes with four built-in ultra-bright LED fixtures at the top of the shelter. With light emanating out from the ceiling, you can dine at dusk with full overhead illumination and dance after dark without bringing out multiple lanterns. The light system even comes with a convenient dimmer switch, so you can choose low-light ambience all the way up to bright task lighting. The lighting system operates on four D batteries (sold separately), but is also compatible with Coleman's CPX 6 battery power system. The canopy is sturdily constructed, with a 28mm steel frame and a tough cover that's made using UVGuard fabric, which provides a superior 50+ ultraviolet protection factor. And Coleman added pinch-free Comfort Grips to the frame, so you can protect your fingers during setup and takedown. Just a single squeeze locks or releases the frame for fast setup or teardown. title: Coleman Rugged A/T Wheeled Cooler, 55 Quart
description: Easily transport cold food and beverages over rugged terrain with the Coleman 50-Quart Xtreme Series Wheeled Cooler. Ideal for camping, hikes, and other outdoor activities that take you off the beaten path, this wheeled cooler box comes equipped with two oversized, 8-inch wheels that provide smooth transport over nearly any terrain. Simply extend and lock the telescoping handle, close the hinged lid, and wheel the cooler wherever you need to go. For the rare occasions when the wheels can't handle the terrain, the EZ-Lift swing handles allow you to easily tout around the cooler by hand. Featuring Keeps the Ice! insulation, this cooler offers exceptional ice retention and keeps your items cold for up to five days in temperatures as high as 90 degrees Fahrenheit. The heavy-duty lid latch helps secure the cooler's contents, while an integrated bungee tie-down system allows you to tether extra gear to the lid. When it is time to go, the leak-resistant drain allows you to easily empty excess water without tilting the cooler. And thanks to its integrated cup holders, this hard cooler helps you keep a beverage always close at hand.
reviewText: Way more capacity than I thought or needed.  Donated it to a local little league.  They were thrilled.

title: Coleman Dome Tent for Camping | Sundome Tent with Easy Setup
description: The Coleman Sundome 6, 10'x10', dome tent is part of the classic Sundome series of tents from Coleman. The Sundome 6 sleeps 6 happy campers and includes a large door for easy entry/exit with a hooded fly to provide ventilation even in rain. A large rear hooded window also provides airflow for cross ventilation. Mesh vents on the roof provide additional ventilation and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against a leaky floor. The coated polyester fabrics on the fly and walls are rugged and durable. Like all Coleman Sundome tents it is easy to set up or take down and features an Electrical Access Port, a ground vent and an interior mesh storage pocket.Freestanding design is easy to set up and take down.2 windows and roof vents for maximum ventilation and comfort.Mesh roof aids in ventilation and reduces condensation.Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.Polyester fly is tough and durable and won't stretch when wet.1 zippered Electrical Access Port to run AC power into the tent.1 vented Cool Air Port for increased ventilation and comfort.1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient clip and continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import.
reviewText: where do I begin...this tent is awesome!!!!!!!! we slept in one owned by friends before purchasing ours and it was great. we set it up completely drunk and it was EASY PEASY so you know this tent will be easy to handle. It's huge, fits 6 (maybe a push with adults) but 4 very comfortably and its luxurious for 2 people...it folds down to a small bag which is fantastic. it rained heavily the first night we camped with ours and it never leaked. and then there is the price, this is sooooo cheap...it's a great buy for all of your camping needs. if you want a tent that's durable and convenient this is your thing.

The Coleman Clear Lake Sleeping Bag is great for warm-weather camping. It measures 33-Inch wide by 75-Inch long, and fits most people up to 5-feet, 11-inches. The Clear Lake Sleeping Bag is durably constructed of a polyester cover with a cozy cotton-flannel liner, with 3 pounds of ThermoTech insulation to keep you comfortable down to 40-60Degree Fahrenheit. The Clear Lake features the QuickCord storage system for easy storage -- no tying required. Coleman-Inchs ComfortSmart technology means your sleeping bag is packed with features to keep you warm and comfortable: ZipPlow plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags; Comfort Cuff surrounds your face with softness; FiberLock prevents insulation from shifting keeping you warm and increasing durability; ThermoLock reduces heat loss through the zipper, keeping you warmer; Zipper Glide tailoring allows smooth zipper operation around corners; and Roll Control locks the bag in place for easier rolling. Ideal for warm weather camping where the temperature won't dip below 40 degrees, the Coleman Clear Lake sleeping bag is durably constructed of a polyester cover with soft, cozy cotton-flannel lining. Three pounds of ThermoTech insulation keep you comfortable throughout the night, and the bag measures 33-by-75 inches (W x D), fitting most campers up to five feet, 11 inches tall. The Clear Lake sleeping bag includes Coleman's ComfortSmart technology, meaning it's full of features to keep you warm and comfortable, such as:
  • ZipPlow: Prevents zipper snags by plowing fabric away from zipper
  • Roll Control: Locks bag in place for easier rolling
  • FiberLock: Prevents insulation from shifting, increasing durability

The Coleman Limited Warranty
Coleman has been in business for more than 100 years, and continues to produce high-quality, affordable tents, lanterns, table-top stoves, and more. reviewText: I do like the material inside the bag, and think these would be ok to sleep in. Outer material could be better (I never liked polyester).  I bought these because of the price, but beware. These sleeping bags are extremely bulky. I used to have goose down sleeping bags. I know I shouldn't compare, but these Coleman sleeping bags just don't roll up, and are 2x the size of my goose down bags. Also, one of the buttons that are supposed to help with rolling the bag up snapped at first use. I'm thinking of returning the bags, but  in the end I'll get 50% of what I payed back. Not sure what to do... Definitely wouldn't buy these again.

title: Coleman Dome Tent with Screen Room | Evanston Camping Tent with Screened-In Porch
description: Enjoy the great outdoors without the bugs inside the Coleman Evanston 8-Person Tent with Screen Room. Great for car camping and extended camping trips, this spacious tent offers enough room for 2 queen-size airbeds and is designed to set up in under 15 minutes thanks to snag-free, continuous pole sleeves and Insta-Clip pole attachments. The tents WeatherTec system features patented welded floors and inverted seams to keep the rain off you and your gear; a rainfly is included for extra weather protection. Extended awnings let you keep the windows open for enhanced air circulation without letting in the rain. The tent also comes with a separate screened-in room for extra ventilation, covered storage for your gear, or an extra sleeping area on warmer, dry nights. Remove the included rainfly to let in more sunlight through the mesh roof on dry days or to gaze up at the stars on dry nights. "
reviewText:
Finally got to use this tent over Easter Weekend. I have the 8-person version, and it was just me and my 3yr old son. I took my time and was able to set up this tent and rain fly, fully staked out, within 30 min by myself. Overall I really liked the tent and look forward to our next trip. There are a couple notes on what could be improved, also.

We had more than enough room inside. I kept our bags in the screen area, and also a camp chair, toiletries, and a few other items. The screen area is a great feature, I appreciated it more than I thought I would.

During the day, we stacked our 2 queen air mattresses to free up some floor space. We could move around easily for getting dressed, and I could stand up straight in the center without bumping my head (I'm 5'11"). I could not stand up in the screen area.

At night we put the 2 queen mattresses side-by-side, and still had room in between the mattresses, and a few feet of space by the foot of the beds.

Could be better:
-This tent doesn't have zipper-port. I used a heater inside and had to run the cord out the middle of the tent and screen area. It would be a great addition to this tent, like most of the other Coleman tents I see.
-The rear side of the tent is all mesh. It's great for ventilation and looking out, but it can't be closed. It should have a zipper window just like the other sides. It got a bit drafty at night.
-The U-shaped door inside the tent could be improved. Only the upper half can be unzipped to make a mesh window. I'd prefer the whole panel have the option. Also, it would be great to have a "double-door" on a tent this size.
-The 2 corners on both sides of the screen area, where they meet the tent, had ~1" holes that were not sewn shut. Manufacturing defect? Either way, this allowed some ants access to the screen area. Rather annoying!!

We didn't have "weather" so I can't attest to how it holds up in wind and rain. If you are looking for a good tent to take a small family camping, I'd recommend this tent.

title: Coleman 9-In. Heavy Duty Aluminum Tent Stakes
description: You'll Sleep soundly knowing your tent is secured with Coleman 9-in. Heavy duty aluminum tent stakes. These lightweight stakes are specially-designed to hold up to large tents and strong winds. When the fun is done, the lanyard on each tip makes easy work of pulling out the stake. Each package includes four stakes.
reviewText: Better than the thing "wire" style states but will still bend with little effort.

title: Coleman Camping Stove | FyreCadet Propane Portable Stove, 2-Burner
description: Serve up a family feast in no time with the Coleman FyreCadet Propane Stove. Each 11,000-BTU burner utilizes our revolutionary HyperFlame technology, which provides an even heat distribution across the pan and better wind resistance to cut boiling time in half when compared to a standard burner in 3 m/sec wind. Wind Block pan supports also provide 360 of wind protection and eliminate the need for side panels so you can use up to a 12-in. and 10-in. pan at the same time. If you're looking for more meal options, the Swaptop interchangeable cooktops let you change out the pan supports with a grill grate or griddle (both sold separately). When you're ready to cook, just hit the Instastart push-button ignition and dial in your heat with the two independently adjustable burners. The PerfectFlow pressure control technology produces a steady fuel stream and consistent burner performance in all kinds of weather. When you're done cooking, the built-in handle and latching lid make for easy carrying back home until you're ready to create your next camping culinary masterpiece.
reviewText: Lights easily as stays lit in high winds. However it's HOT. Food cooks fast and burns quickly. The low setting is not low so it's super hard to adjust temp. We bought the grill plates as well.

title: Coleman Quad LED Lantern Special Edition Ultra Bright 190 Lumens, Red
description:
Take the convenience of four lights in one with you with the Coleman Quad LED Lantern. Together the lantern shines 190 ultra-bright lumens for up to 75 hours. During an emergency, pop one of the four lights off the base for a personal flashlight. They recharge once theyre back on the base for hands-free light. The 24 LEDs last a lifetime, so they never need replacing and the lantern runs cool so its always safe to touch, even when its been on for hours. Combining an area light with four portable lanterns in a single clever unit, the Coleman LED Quad lantern is a versatile choice for indoor or outdoor use. The Quad is equipped with four removable LED panels that hold 24 LED lights total. Users can remove any of the four panels and use them independently, such as when needing a portable light for the bathroom or tent, or they can keep all four attached to the lantern and produce 190 total lumens of light. As a result, the Quad is the perfect light for group camping trips and any other occasion where folks might splinter off into smaller groups during the night. Each of the panels is a fully functioning light, with six 5mm white LEDs, a rechargeable NiMH battery, an independent on/off switch, and a top handle for carrying or hanging. The NiMH battery--which recharges when stored in the lantern base--provides up to 1.5 hours of light on its own. The lantern base, meanwhile, requires eight D-cell batteries (not included), which provide an approximate run time of 75 hours for the entire lantern. Other features include a main on/off switch located on top of the lantern, a light range of 26 feet, and a limited five-year warranty. About Coleman

reviewText:
Bought it as a gift for a man who has everything.
well he didn't have one of these yet, so it was a winner as far as I was concerned.
Saw it on QVC and thought it was very cool.
Great innovative use of LEDs.
Useful in so many ways, indoor during a power outage and for outdoor needs.

title: Coleman Jug 1-Gallon Insulated Jug
description: Great for sporting events, tailgating, picnics, BBQs and more, the Coleman 1-Gallon Jug features a flip-top spout for easy, no-leak sipping and pouring. The Jug's wide-mouth, twist-on cap makes it convenient to fill and clean, while the sturdy bail handle allows for comfortable carrying. The Jug liner was designed with the strongest and safest materials allowed by the FDA, and the rugged outside resists dents, scratches and fading. Color: Red.
reviewText: I bring this jug to work everyday and it rides around in the box of my work truck. It takes a beating and keeps my water very cold. If the lid isn't tight it can leak a little but overall I am very satisfied.

title: Coleman Camping First Aid Kit an All Purpose First Aid Kit for Emergencies at Home, Car, Workplace, Hiking, or Survival, 205-Pieces
description: The Coleman Expedition First Aid Kit is the ultimate all purpose first aid kit for larger groups or outdoor adventures. This 205 piece kit features components needed in the field, including various standard and specialty bandages, first aid tape, gauze pads, antiseptic towels, antibiotic ointment, sting relief wipes, a cold pack and common first aid tools. All the first aid supplies are organized in a zipped, durable, semi-hard case. The unique EZ Find System keeps your items organized and easy to find during an emergency. There is space in the kit for your specialized medical supplies or medications so you can fully customize this first aid kit to fit your needs. The Coleman Expedition First Aid Kit is the perfect first aid kit for your home, RV, car, bug out bag, or for groups when camping, hiking, at sporting events, workplace, and more.
reviewText: I was a little worried when I read some of the reviews, but it has great  variety of basic stuff, and it all fits in the case with ease. I even found it has a little room to fit a few extra things you might want to add, unlike what a other reviewer said. I'm very happy with this basic little first aid kit, and impressed with how much is  actually in it.

title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
reviewText: i can not turn down the flame, when I set it on the low I still high and burns everything you cook.do not buy.

title: Coleman Camper’s Toilet Paper, 3 Rolls
description: Take an everyday hygiene necessity on camping trips with Coleman Campers Toilet Paper. Includes 3 rolls of biodegradable, septic-safe 2-ply toilet paper that easily fits in any camping backpack. Each roll contains at least 65 squares of premium tissue and comes in a case that also doubles as a dispenser for added convenience. Compact and convenient, Coleman Campers Toilet Paper lets you take an essential indoor comfort wherever the trail leads.
reviewText: good item, prompt delivery

title: Coleman CPX 6 Double Edge LED Flashlight Lantern
description: Coleman, Double Edge Flashlight & Lantern Combo, High Performance Flashlight & Lantern All In One, It Works Multiple Ways: As A Soft Glow From The Base, As A 200 Lumen Lantern, A Brighter 300 Lumen Lantern Or As A Rechargeable Flashlight That Stores Inside The Lantern's Core, Flashlight: 314 FT Beam Distance & 1.5 Hours Max Runtime, Lantern: Up To 100 Hours Of Runtime On Soft Glow Setting & Up To 20 Hours Of Runtime On High Setting, Operates On Either 4 "D" Batteries Or Using The CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge TV #130-279, Not Included, Both Sold Separately.
reviewText: There are better lanterns available on the market. The flashlight crapped out after a week and will not recharge.

title: Coleman 70 Quart Xtreme 5 Cooler
description: Keep your food and drinks cold for an extended time, and make the fun last longer, when you bring a Coleman 70 Quart Xtreme 5 Cooler. Xtreme technology uses an insulated lid and extra insulation in the walls to keep your items cold for up to 5 days. Large enough to hold 98 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on a long weekend camping trip, a roadtrip, or out to a BBQ, the 2-way handles make getting to your destination easy. Once you arrive, the cup holders molded into the lid will keep your cold drink close while you enjoy the day. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. The Coleman 50-Quart Xtreme Cooler is the ideal traveling companion. The large icy blue cooler and white lid are lined with a full two full inches of insulation and the hinged lid also features a secure and tight gasket seal, ensuring that your cooler will keep food and beverages chilled for up to five days at temperatures of up to 90 degrees. Holding up to 98 beverage cans with ice, this cooler features two-way handles for easy lift and maneuvering in tight spaces, and the sump-lined drain promises easy clean-up and no-tilt draining--a plus for this large capacity cooler. This models lid can be fitted with 24-inch cords (not included) for additional dry storage--lawn chairs, beach towels, picnic blankets, etc.--on top. The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: Nothing is made like it use to be. I like the cooler, worry the handles will not hold up. Good price with free ship so far I am happy with my purchase.

title: Coleman Large Dual Action Hand Pump
description: Pump, Large Dual Action Hand
reviewText: I was looking for something to fill my swiss balls which came with the little hand pumps.  I first tried an adapter for my little compressor (the type plugged into a car's outlet).  That didn't work.  The Coleman dual action pump work spendlidy.  It pumps air on both the upward and downward strokes of the handle filling the ball quite rapidly.  I couldn't be more pleased with this thing.

title: Coleman Soft Plush Top Inflated Quickbed
description: Take the comfort of an indoor bed with you when you sleep outside on the Coleman Queen Airbed Folding Cot with Side Tables and 4D Battery Pump. Connect the included 4D pump to the Double Lock valve for easy, leak-free inflation. Once you find the perfect firmness, the AirTight system will help keep it that way through the night, since it's factory-tested to be leak-free. The ComfortStrong coil system provides all-night support. It is more than a place to sleep with 2 side tables with cup holders to easily place your drink, a snack, a magazine, or personal items on both sides of the bed. A sewn-in cover keeps the airbed in place on the strong steel frame. When youre ready to pack up, the Double Lock valve lets you deflate the airbed just as easily, and it folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.
reviewText:
I just plain love airbeds, can't imagine why anybody would sleep on something else. I have bought lots of them over the years.

At the local megastore, Coleman's new "single high" airbeds are cheaper than the old version, but they suck (or blow, leak, whatever). I've tried two recently. No more Coleman for a while.

I'd like a thicker material, so I have ordered the other popular "outdoor" brand that says the plastic is "15 gauge". Any other suggestions are invited. I don't want to spend $100 per mattress since the risk of failure is high with all of these things. Get a good one and it will last for over a year. Awesome bedding. But when they leak, the awesomeness turns to serious frustration.

title: Coleman 2000014864 Mosquito Head Net
description: Enjoy the outdoors without the pests when you're wearing a Coleman Mosquito Head Net. The fine mesh stops insects from biting, while still allowing you to see nature's beauty. Keep flying insects out when hiking or working in mosquito- or gnat-ridden territory with the Coleman insect head net. The net is designed to fit comfortably over most headgear, and is made with a 1mm maximum netting grade.
reviewText: I received the head netwear, the bugs haven't got thick yet, so I'll review it when I start getting those pesty bugs.

title: Coleman 24-Piece Enamel Dinnerware Set, Red
description:
Serve up your favorite foods around the campfire or portable stove with the Coleman 24-Piece Enamel Dinnerware Set. Made of double-fired enamel and featuring a timeless red speckled design, this outdoor dinnerware set offers classic style and durability and is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. This 24-piece set includes four 10-inch dinner plates, four 12-ounce coffee mugs with handles, and four 6-inch bowls, making it a great choice for family meals at picnics, BBQs, and campsites. It also includes a silverware kit with four plastic-handled forks, spoons, and knives stored in a convenient roll-up pouch for easy organization and storage. Ideal for camping, picnicking, and even backyard use, this set of Coleman speckled dinnerware includes everything you need to eat a meal under the stars. The 24-piece set is outfitted with four 10-inch dinner plates, four 10-ounce mugs, and four 6-inch bowls, giving you and three co-campers enough containers for a main course, a side salad, and an after-dinner hot chocolate. In addition, the set comes with four knives, four spoons, and four forks, so you don't need to rely on plastic silverware when eating. Best of all, the set is durable and dishwasher-safe, with a red-speckled enamel surface that holds up to heavy use. The silverware also includes a compact carrying case to keep the cutlery bunched together. About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: Neat idea, but they all chipped up VERY easily.

title: Coleman Dome Tent with Screen Room | Evanston Camping Tent with Screened-In Porch
description: Enjoy the great outdoors without the bugs inside the Coleman Evanston 8-Person Tent with Screen Room. Great for car camping and extended camping trips, this spacious tent offers enough room for 2 queen-size airbeds and is designed to set up in under 15 minutes thanks to snag-free, continuous pole sleeves and Insta-Clip pole attachments. The tents WeatherTec system features patented welded floors and inverted seams to keep the rain off you and your gear; a rainfly is included for extra weather protection. Extended awnings let you keep the windows open for enhanced air circulation without letting in the rain. The tent also comes with a separate screened-in room for extra ventilation, covered storage for your gear, or an extra sleeping area on warmer, dry nights. Remove the included rainfly to let in more sunlight through the mesh roof on dry days or to gaze up at the stars on dry nights. "
reviewText: I have used the smaller version of this tent without the screen porch. There was an incident with rocks and wind in Death Valley so I replaced the old one with this one. The footprint is quite large but assembly is very easy. Two of us share the tent with each of us on our own Coleman cot. It is perfect for car camping in the nation parks. There is a tear-away strip on the bottom of the bag to make it bigger so packing it away is not as difficult.

title: Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Small
description: Take your Coleman stove wherever outdoor adventures lead you with the Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Small. Designed to fit small Coleman 2-burner stoves measuring up to 20.4 x 12 x 4.5 inches, this rugged carry case made from PVC-coated polyester protects your stove during transportation and storage. Strong web handles provide comfort when toting stoves between campsites, while the durable zipper is designed to keep stoves safe and dry. Two propane pouches with drawstrings securely carry extra fuel canisters (sold separately).
reviewText: I like having a case for the my camp stove.  You kinda have to own a case like this otherwise the stove is pretty awkward to tote around.  Bummer it's not included when you buy your stove.  Price is reason for 4/5.

title: Coleman Full Size Quickbed with 4D Pump and Wrap 'N' Roll Storage
description:
The Coleman Double-Sized Quickbed With 4D Pump is a great choice for camping, overnight guests, or anywhere you need an extra bed. Measuring 74" long by 54" wide when inflated (fitting standard double sheets), the Quickbed is made of heavy-duty, puncture-resistant PVC, with 40 coils inside and a soft suede top for extra comfort. The Quickbed is easy to inflate and deflate, thanks to the included 4D pump (requires four D batteries, not included). Like all Coleman inflatable products, this Quickbed features Coleman's Airtight System, guaranteed not to leak. And the built-in Wrap 'N' Roll storage system makes packing and storing quick and easy.


A Coleman 4D pump is included, for fast, easy inflation and deflation.
Perhaps no single factor affects your enjoyment of a camping trip as much as a good night's sleep, and it starts with a quality air mattress and fast, convenient pump. The Full Size Quickbed with 4D Pump and Wrap 'N' Roll Storage, from leading outdoor outfitter Coleman, handles all of the above in one simple, convenient package. Measuring 54-by-74 inches (W x D) when inflated, the mattress fits standard double sheets, making it ideal for a ready-made guest bed, in addition to its obvious camping creature comfort use. It's made of heavy-duty, puncture-resistant PVC material for long-lasting durability, and the 40 interior coils and soft suede top provide a surprisingly cozy, back-supporting night's sleep. Inflation and deflating is a breeze, thanks to the included 4D air pump, which runs on four D batteries (not included). A built-in Wrap 'N' Roll storage system helps you roll the deflated mattress into as compact a package as possible. Thanks to the Coleman Airtight System and Double-Lock Valve, the bed is guaranteed to be a leak-free inflatable bed, as well as easy to inflate and deflate quickly. The Coleman Airtight System features:
  • Advanced Double Lock Valve: Exclusive valve locks air in twice, and opens extra wide for quick and easy inflation and deflation
  • Exclusive PVC Formula: 15% more puncture resistant than the leading competition, and holds up to 600-pounds
  • Sturdy coil Design: Adds more strength, firmness, and comfort than beam construction
The Coleman Limited Warranty
Coleman has been in business for more than 100 years, and continues to produce high-quality, affordable tents, lanterns, table-top stoves, and more. All Coleman products have a limited manufacturer's warranty against defects in material and workmanship, and warranty specifics are included with your purchase. About Coleman Outdoor Products
More than 100 years ago, an entrepreneurial young man named W.C. Coleman had an idea for manufacturing better lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. A century later, Coleman's current catalog features a wide-ranging array of products that make spending time outside a pleasure. The company crafts coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days, airbeds that are comfortable and won't deflate during the night, a complete line of bright and long-lasting LED lights, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and more.
reviewText:
This bed is very comfortable and well designed. It rolls up compactly into an attached sleeve. The pump works really well, way better than a foot pump (but it requires 4 C batteries).

The one big downside is that the bed sprung a leak after about a week of use. Amazon was very cool about the return tho. I'll try another, if the same thing happens then I'll change the review to one star but for now I'll assume the bed was defective.

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText: good

title: Coleman Trailhead II Cot
reviewText: so it's one year later.  When in one piece, this cot is super sturdy and comfortable.  It's a great length and has no crossbar.  This cot has been used on 4 camping trips and we are both well under the 300 lb weight limit.  During our 4th trip with the cots (last weekend) the ENTIRE 6 foot side of the cot ripped away from the camouflage fabric part.  End to end.  My hubby had to sleep on the ground the rest of the trip.  Oddly, we were just praising the durability of the cot to our friends the day before.  But now it is completely unusable after just 4 camping trips.  I'm hoping Coleman will make good.

I figured with the stakes and mallet I can do some damage to those buggers and then I can use the broom if I need to clean up any of the mess. Too bad I haven't found one zombie since I bought this thing. I am planning on heading to Alexandra VA soon maybe I will find them there

title: Coleman Steel-Belted Portable Cooler, 54 Quart

Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip steel handles and stainless steel lid latch make getting to your destination easy, comfortable and secure. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. A Coleman Steel Belted Cooler will rekindle your fondest outdoor memories  and equip you to make many new ones.

I used it anyway.  If you leave water in it for a few hours, the plastic taste it adds isn't horrible, but any longer and the water tastes funny.

title: Coleman Dome Tent for Camping | Sundome Tent with Easy Setup
description: " The Coleman Sundome 4-Person Tent is designed for quick and easy setup, so you can spend more time enjoying the outdoors. Great for camping in warm weather, this backpacking tent is designed with large windows and a ground vent to help push warm air up and out to keep you comfortable. The WeatherTec system with patented welded floors and inverted seams helps ensure you stay dry if the weather turns, while the sturdy frame with Insta-Clip pole attachments stands up to 35+ mph winds. A rainfly with an integrated door awning is included to help keep rain from getting into the tent, and the durable Polyguard 2X double-thick fabric is designed to withstand the elements for reliable use season after season. This dome tent offers enough room for one queen size air mattress and comes with built-in storage pockets to help keep your gear organized. reviewText: This tent I would not recommend. Literally broke THE FIRST TRIP. It was windy and a strap literally ripped right on the stake. Very disappointed.

title: Coleman 2-Person Pop-Up Tent
description: Great for festivals and car camping, the Coleman 2-Person Pop-Up Tent sets up in as little as 10 seconds, letting you get back to the fun. This camping tent is uniquely designed with preassembled poles, allowing the tent to pop into place in a snap. The taped floor seams keep you dry even when the ground is soaking wet, while the multi-position rainfly allows you to find the perfect balance of protection and ventilation. reviewText:
WAAAAAY too small to be rated for 2 people.  Maybe if you can stand sleeping on top of somebody all night then you're ok.  But I'm only good for that kind of thing for 15, 20 minutes TOPS.

Other than that, it's a cool tent.  Quality seems nice.  I'd recommend throwing it away from you when you pop it, otherwise you're gonna get a high velocity face full of tent followed by a bunch of fellow campers laughing at you, then bringing it up constantly for the duration of your trip.

title: Coleman Instant Pop-Up Canopy Tent and Sun Shelter, 13 x 13 Feet
description:
The Coleman Instant Pop-Up Canopy Tent and Sun Shelter, 13 x 13 Feet, assembles in 3 minutes in 3 easy steps to create a shady area outdoors. This canopy cover is made with UV Guard material that offers protection from the suns harmful rays and features 2-way roof vents to keep the air circulating when the temperature rises. The lightweight preattached telescoping poles can be assembled without having to reach over your head, so anyone can set up the tent easily, while comfort grips lock the shelter into place with pinch-free adjustability. Once the canopy tent is assembled, it offers stable shelter on grass, concrete, and asphalt thanks to its welded steel feet. When its time to pack up, this shelter can be stored and transported in the included easy-pull wheeled carry bag, which fits inside most cars. The Coleman 13-by-13-foot Back Home Instant Shelter provides an easy, convenient shelter in the backyard, at a campsite, sporting event, or wherever you need reliable cover from the sun. The Shelter's sturdy, one-piece steel frame sets up quickly and easily in only three minutes, with Coleman's exclusive push-button release levers so your fingers stay safe during setup and takedown. The heavy-duty shelter canopy gives you an instant hex-shaped shelter with a generous center height of eight feet, four inches and also features SPF 50+ UV Guard protection from the sun's rays. Features:
  • Sets up in less than 3 minutes
  • Heavy-duty 150D canopy with 50+ UV Guard sun protection
  • Sturdy 28mm one-piece steel frame
  • Exclusive push-button release levers take it easy on fingers
  • Hexagon shape for a distinct shelter
  • Wheeled carry bag
  • Footed poles for easy securing and stabilization with steel tent pegs
Specifications:
  • Shaded Area: 13 by 13 feet
  • Footprint: 10 by 10 feet
About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
reviewText: I get tons of compliments on this. I've had for over two years and it is still in great shape. Very easy to set up and convenient to travel because of its case. Everyone is jealous of the size, I guess 10x10 is the norm.

title: Coleman Stove Carry Case, Black - 2000020971
description: Add even more portability to your Coleman stove when you pack it in a durable Coleman Stove Carry Case. This heavy-duty vinyl case protects the stove while you're storing it and transporting it. The bag's strong, easy-carry handles and durable zipper secure the stove during transport, and two storage pouches keep standard 16.4-oz. propane cylinders close.
reviewText: Good quality and fit.

title: Coleman Instant Cabin 10 Tent with Fly
description: The Coleman Instant Tent 10 will sleep 10 people. It sets up in about 1 minute and take down is about the same. Made with rugged fabrics and an ingeniously easy set up system the Instant Cabin 10 will delight you with it's ease of construction. 7 windows give excellent ventilation and the rugged Polyethylene floor is tough and durable. Rugged Powder Coated Steel poles and easy folding frame are the heart of this radical tent design that will forever change your view of how fast a tent should take to set up. The roof is comprised of mesh panels for excellent ventilation (covered by the rain fly). Includes Factory Sealed rainfly that attaches in seconds.Freestanding Design is simple and fast to set up.Includes a Heavy Duty 150D Polyester Factory Sealed Rainfly.Zipper flap on the door keeps moisture out.Interior will fit 4 queen size air mattresses.7 windows for excellent ventilation - all windows have Storm Flaps & huge mesh roof panels for improved ventilation.Inner Mesh Storage Pockets.Take Down is fast and easy - about 1 minute.Set up the tent in Rain and the interior stays dry.Straighter walls than most tents for more usable space in the tent.No frame assembly or pre-assembly needed - poles are attached to the tent - just unfold the tent to set it up.External Guy Out Loops - keep the tent stable in wind.Lantern loop on the ceiling.Instructions are sewn to the bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.Sturdy Powder Coated Steel Frame.All carry bags, stakes included.Import.
reviewText:
We recently purchased this tent from Costco for $185. We had an old Coleman tent (about 30 years old) that needed replacing and I had been eyeing the instant tents for years.

Pros:
Very easy set up - especially compared to the complicated set up of our similarly sized tent we had before. That being said - cut the instructions out of the bag and throw them away... Watch a You Tube video or two and you'll see how easy set up and take down really is. I also really like the entrances at both ends of the tent, especially because my husband and I take the "back" and put the kids up front. There is a lot of ventilation, which I love. The hindged door is nice, although getting it to Velcro shut can be a pain.

Cons:
The room divider is very flimsy and seems like an afterthought. Our old Coleman had a much better room divider. This was disappointing for me as one of my main reasons for getting a tent this size was the two rooms.

title: Coleman 9-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
description: Keep food and drinks cold with the Coleman Soft Cooler. This compact, portable cooler bag holds up to nine cans and offers plenty of space for a family picnic or game-day snacks. Heat-welded seams in the zippered main compartment prevent leaks and maintain a cold environment, while the removable hard plastic liner fits snugly inside the soft cooler and allows you to easily dump out any ice melt. When not using the hard plastic liner, you can use ice substitutes to keep contents cold and dry. The cooler bag's easy-clean interior has an antimicrobial lining to resist formation of mold, mildew, fungus, and odor. A zippered front pocket, pocket under the lid, and two side mesh pockets make it easy to carry water bottles, snacks, silverware, and other accessories. You can also secure items to the top with the convenient bungee cords built into the lid. An adjustable shoulder strap lets you comfortably carry the cooler anywhere you go.
reviewText: My husband uses this product every day on his work truck.  It has held up very nicely over the summer.  It keep his lunch cool.  I really like the pull out plastic lining.  It makes the bag really easy to clean and keeps his sandwich in from getting smashed as he throws it around.  If you need a heavy duty lunch bag.... I would recommend.

reviewText: We were going to "make up" a First Aid Kit, then we seen this and we had almost everything we wanted.  It is a super package; we added type of cut heal powder that the wife picked up.  It is well worth the money to get this complete packet.

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText:
Our first night was at the Grand Canyon. The tent leaked through the rainfly.

Our fourth night was in Death Valley. The tent was blowing away and collapsing on itself with 20 mph wind.

This tent was supposed to be waterproof. This tent was supposed to stand up in 35 mph wind. Luckily we purchased heavy duty tent stakes and kiwi waterproofing spray along the way. With those two additions the tent worked great and held up to weather. DO NOT buy this tent and expect it to be weatherproof out of the box, BUT with some heavy duty stakes and waterproof spray this tent will do the job.
