reviewText:
FIRST VACATION IN 10 years!!!!  This tent is IT and then some! I always read reviews but only write ones that I believe may be helpful! I have Severe RA and Lupus and now that the kids are grown and gone and thanks to new meds I am anxious to see if camping can be possible when you have "issues" or challenges. The sun sensitivity and extra years and weight held me back from enjoying the outdoors again. The right tent is the most important. I melt in the heat, cannot handle UV sun sensitivity from the meds, and the kids are grown and gone. So everything has to be light and easy. After getting it wrong twice (thank you Amazon CSR secret agents!) THIS IS THE TENT (No reduced priced no free merchandise) Just amazed at this. It has all this going for it

1. Light
2. Ventalation Ventalation Ventalation
3. Easy Peasy set up
4. Well made
5. Haven't been rained on but reviews are assuring. I will update if needed

So I would recommend and buy again!!!

title: Coleman PerfectFlow InstaStart 2-Burner Stove
description:
The Coleman PerfectFlow InstaStart 2-Burner Propane Stove makes campside cooking a breeze. Each burner delivers a fully-adjustable 10,000 BTUs with dependable, matchless InstaStart push-button ignition. The PerfectFlow propane pressure control ensures consistent cooking performance by producing a steady fuel stream -- even in cold weather, at high altitudes, or when fuel is low. What's more, the folding WindBlock system provides side panels to block the wind and foster more efficient cooking. The panels can alternately be folded down to form side shelves, which can be convenient condiment or utensil holders. With both burners on High, the stove provides about an hour of cooking time on one 16.4-oz propane cylinder (sold separately). The stove's rust-resistant enamel-painted case and removable nickel-chrome grate are a breeze to clean, and the secure latching lid and convenient carry handle make it easy to bring along. Cook up a full meal without running out of cooking space with the Coleman EvenTemp InstaStart two-burner stove. Designed to accommodate a pair of pots or skillets at once, the stove offers two fully adjustable, 10,000 BTU burners, each equipped with Coleman's matchless InstaStart pushbutton ignition. The result is an easy-to-use stove that delivers an elite cooking performance time and again. Outdoor chefs will also appreciate the stove's PerfectFlow propane pressure control, which produces a steady fuel stream even in cold weather, high altitudes, or when fuel is low. The stove's PerfectHeat technology, meanwhile, employs recessed cook tops and lowered burner positions to generate efficient cooking heat. And thanks to the WindBlock side panels, the burners can stave off the elements while you cook. (The side panels also fold down to form side shelves for condiments or utensils.) So give yourself the gift of convenience and serious cooking power with this durable camping stove from Coleman. About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: I've only tested this thing once, and it worked great! Very easy to set up with alot of heat available. The only thing I wish it had was a latch to hold the regulator securley in place. I think the old coleman liquid white gas stoves did have latches to hold everything neat and secure inside while transporting. But a  few wire ties or plastic sandwich bags solve the problem. That's why I don't give it 5 stars.

title: Coleman Autumn Trails 30 Degree Sleeping Bag

Best of all, the set is durable and dishwasher-safe, with a red-speckled enamel surface that holds up to heavy use. The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: The silverware is very poor quality therefore we give only four stars. The cups and dishes are nice. The forks are terrible. The fork is almost straight and you can't hold food on it very well.  The knifes were nice and sharp that was good.

title: Coleman Exponent Multi-Fuel Stove
description: The Coleman Multi-Fuel Stove offers sturdy, compact design and versatile, powerful performance. The integrated fuel tank operates on your choice of Coleman fuel, unleaded gasoline or kerosene (kerosene generator included). The sturdy fold-out legs keep the stove stable, while burner bowl and pot supports help protect the flame even in windy conditions. Precise flame control allows you to go from simmer to boil. Stove weighs 21.6 ounces. Get ready to cook with the Coleman Exponent 550B725 Multi-Fuel camp stove, which weighs 21.6 ounces. Fill up the integrated tank one time and use it all weekend. It operates on either Coleman fuel or unleaded gasoline, and can also operate on kerosene with an optional generator. Thanks to Coleman's PerfectFlow feature, it's regulated for a constant, consistent burn (without flaring or flickering). Other features include fold-out legs and wind-protecting burner bowel and pot supports. The Coleman Exponent 550-6771 Maintenance Kit is a recommended accessory.
reviewText:
I purchased this a few months ago after the power at home went out for 6 hours and I could not heat up any dinner.  My thought was you always have some unleaded gas around the house (in your car or for the boat).

I forgot about it until we had the 6.1 earthquake Sunday here in Hawaii - I opened the box, found some unleaded gas - filled it up, pumped the tank up a few stokes, and lit the burner - hot coffee in no time.  This burns very hot and heated a tea kettle of water in about 5 minutes - burns clean with no soot or smoke.

I'd highly recommend one for your emergency kit - you never know who long the power might be out.

title: Coleman Multi-Color LED Headlamp Realtree AP Camo
description: Coleman 2000006693 LED 3AAA multi color camo. Camping lights headlamps. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping lights headlamps
reviewText: pretty nice.  Only used it a couple times but had none of the issues listed on the reviews.  the dial was fine and easy to switch.

title: Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue
description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
reviewText: The jug is fine but the spigot is terrible. The top part snapped off with very little use. If you decide to buy this make sure to buy 2 or 3 additional spigots. Better yet look to another brand.

title: Coleman Tent Kit
description: Set up the tent quickly with the steel tent pegs and rubber mallet. Keep it clean for the entire campout with the nesting hand broom and dustpan. When the fun is done, use the tent stake puller to get the pegs out of the ground easily. All four of these important tools fit nicely inside the mesh carry bag for the next adventure.
reviewText: Handy kit with very useful camping gear.

title: Coleman Montana 6-1239;x739; 6 Person Tent
description: The Montana 6 tent from Coleman sleeps 6 campers and includes 1 large 'D' style door for easy entry/exit with a hooded fly to provide ventilation even in rain. A large hooded awning over the front door provides airflow for cross ventilation as well as nice place to lounge out of sun or rain.. Mesh vents on the roof provide additional ventilation and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against a leaky floor.Polyester fly snd wall fabric (450mm coating) are tough and durable..Windows and roof vents for maximum ventilation and comfort.Mesh roof aids in ventilation and reduces condensation.Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.Polyester fly is tough and durable and won't stretch when wet.1 zippered Electrical Access Port to run AC power into the tent.1 vented Cool Air Port for increased ventilation and comfort.1 interior storage pocket.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.Polyethylene welcome mat for muddy shoes.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Combination clips and continuous pole sleeves for a quick easy set up every time.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..
reviewText:
I was so proud to own a Coleman tent, reviewing the website on how they test each tent though the rain & wind. The majority of my camping/tailgating gears are Coleman products.
I went camping and it rained, of course; the tent was so comfortable,  I looked up and saw the rain guard working, leaving the rain on the outside of the tent. That made me smile, then I noticed in all 4 corners of the tent water is coming into the tent.
I was so disappointed. Coleman finally failed me!
Please refund

title: Coleman CPX 4.5 LED Tent Light
description: The CPX 4.5 LED Tent Light by Coleman is compatible with any tent and even attaches to the tent wall allowing you to pivot the light where you need it. The CPX system lets you choose your power: three AAA cell batteries (included) or one CPX 4.5 rechargeable power cartridge (sold separately - Campmor item #84089). The battery meter changes from yellow to red as battery life is depleted.Magnetically attaches to any tent or metal surface.No tools required.Water resistant.Lifetime of light - LEDs don't need to be replaced.LED battery meter, changes color when battery power is low.Three light modes, white light on high or low and a low power amber nightlight.Size: W 2.75", H 5".Weight: 0.59 oz..
reviewText:
After trying to figure out how to get the batteries installed, for about 20 minutes, I opted to just give up.
Because of the way I removed the packaging (the typical complicated to remove packaging), I do not think I can return the item.
So I am bagging it up, and sticking it in my Good Will donation bag.
Maybe the next owner will be able to figure it out.

title: Coleman Tie-Style Mantle, 4-Pack
description: Coleman 3000004344 mantle sock tie 4Pk. Camping lights lanterns. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping lights lanterns
reviewText: Same as found in  sporting goods stores

title: Coleman Classic Propane Stove
description: Coleman Classic Propane Stove About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
reviewText: flame adjustment is very sensitive

title: MLB XL Cooler Quad Chair
description: Enjoy the outdoors, tailgate or weekend barbeque in style and comfort while showing off your team spirit!
reviewText: Big cub fan... and use it for ice fishing!

title: Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Grill Case for LX Series Grills
description: Add even more portability to your Coleman RoadTrip LX Series Grill when you pack it inside a Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Case. This heavy-duty, weather-resistant case includes easy-glide wheels for more mobility and top and side handles for better control. A durable zipper and inner straps secure the grill the entire trip, and inside pockets fit accessories and condiments for whatever meal youre planning to cook up.
reviewText: Does not fit my Coleman RoadTrip.  It came up as a recommended when I purchased the grill, purchased, didn't need until now so unboxed it. March 11 was deadline to return. Today is March 30 :( going in the trash. Oh well

title: Coleman 16-Quart Personal Wheeled Cooler, Blue
description:
Keep your food and drinks cold, and keep the fun going, for up to 2 days when you roll in with a Coleman 16 Quart Performance Wheeled Cooler. Large enough to hold 22 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for several people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or across the ball field, the recessed wheels and long, telescoping handle let you roll up with hardly any effort. The additional molded handles make it easy to lift your cooler in and out of the car or onto a picnic bench. Coleman provides a convenient way to keep things cold, even when you're on-the-go, with the 16-Quart Personal Wheeled Cooler. This convenient cooler can hold up to 22 12-ounce cans or two 2-liter bottles upright and features traditional Coleman construction for rugged durability. Other features include an extendable handle that retracts for convenient storage and recessed wheels for easy transport to and from your favorite sporting events and outdoor activities. This durable Coleman cooler comes with a limited manufacturer's warranty. About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: It's fine if you're going to "drag" it behind or push it in front of you.  It does not have provision to carry with one hand

title: Coleman Family Sized Classic LED Lantern
description: With the Coleman Family-Sized Classic LED Lantern, bigger really is brighter: the lantern is perfect for lighting up a campsite, backyard entertaining, and emergency use. With Coleman's interchangeable CPX 6 system, you can choose your power: insert 4 D batteries (not included) into the battery cartridge, or upgrade by purchasing the CPX rechargeable power pack and make your lantern a rechargeable deviceand use either option interchangeably with any Coleman CPX 6 device! The Family-Sized LED Lantern features a super-bright high-intensity LED that never needs to be replaced, with a diffuser tube for a perfect beam pattern and reduced glare. On the Low setting, it runs for up to 50 hours, and on High for up to 25 hours. The Coleman LED Lantern is weather-resistant, so it's a reliable choice to withstand the elements. The wire bail handle is convenient for carrying or hanging the lantern wherever you need it.
reviewText: This a great sized lantern and I really liked the two light settings (dim and high). I especially liked that it can be used with a rechargeable battery pack. We just used it on a camping trip without the rechargeable pack and used 4 D batteries. We were really disappointed in this lantern. The battery pack (with four D batteries) didn't fit snugly in the base of the lantern, so out light kept cutting out in us. We ended up duct taping the bottom of the lantern to secure a tight fit to the base so the connection would be continuous. As much as I liked the look (and the option of a rechargeable battery), I will be returning it.

title: Coleman Trailhead II Cot
reviewText: Took the strength of Goliath to put the end bar ON. Not enough give to put it in... I would have never been able to do it myself.... not sure if that was faulty or how it is... but the kids slept on it with no issue.  It's big enough for an adult.

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText: Leaky, leaky and even more leaky!  We had to cut our camping trip short because on the 3rd night of our 6 night trip it rained for a couple of hours and water pooled in the middle of the floor...soaking everything we had with!  Upon inspection we found that the water was actually coming from the specially sealed seams.  Very disappointed.  Wrecked what had been a wonderful family vacation.  Perfect tent if you are camping in the desert and guaranteed no rain.

title: Coleman Triton Series 2-Burner Stove
description: Cook breakfast, lunch and dinner on the legendary durability of a Coleman Triton Series 2-Burner Stove. Once this propane camping stove starts to heat up, PerfectHeat Technology gets the temperatures just right, WindBlock Shields keep the wind from blowing the flames around and the PerfectFlow Pressure Control System keeps the heat steady on each of the high-performance 11,000-BTU burners. The spacious cooking surface is large enough to fit a 10-in. (25.4 cm) pan and 12-in. (30.48 cm) pan at the same time, and independently-adjustable controls allow you to set your heat anywhere from simmer to boil. The two burner camp stove is also efficient, with a 1-hr. runtime on high using a single 16.4-oz. propane cylinder. When the fun is done, removable heavy-duty, nickel-chrome grates make cleaning easy, and the built-in handle will have you carrying this lightweight stove effortlessly.
reviewText:
I guess it's shame on me for not reading into the info and guessing what was missing.
Great stove for the money-- if you don't mind carrying matches. Wish this was represented before the purchase.

Now I will have to upgrade, only I will look in the stores to make sure of what I am getting

title: Coleman Cabin Tent with Instant Setup | Cabin Tent for Camping Sets Up in 60 Seconds
description: The Coleman Instant Cabin makes getting camp set up quicker and easier than ever. This instant tent has pre-attached poles that make setting up camp as simple as unfolding, extending, and securing. You can assemble the tent in about a minute and then get started on your adventure. This camping tent is designed with the WeatherTec system that features patented welded floors and inverted seams to help ensure you stay dry if it starts to rain. An integrated vented rainfly offers added protection from the rain and improves airflow without the need for extra assembly. This backpacking tent is made from rugged Polyguard 2X double-thick fabric that stands up to the rigors of the outdoors, so you can use it reliably season after season. This 6-person tent offers enough room for two queen size air beds and comes with integrated storage pockets to help you keep small items organized. And when its time to go home, the camping tent packs away securely in the included expandable carry bag that lets you tear away the rip strip for easy packing.
reviewText: Great tent! Easy set up and tear down.

title: Coleman Camper’s Toilet Paper, 3 Rolls
description: Take an everyday hygiene necessity on camping trips with Coleman Campers Toilet Paper. Includes 3 rolls of biodegradable, septic-safe 2-ply toilet paper that easily fits in any camping backpack. Each roll contains at least 65 squares of premium tissue and comes in a case that also doubles as a dispenser for added convenience. Compact and convenient, Coleman Campers Toilet Paper lets you take an essential indoor comfort wherever the trail leads.
reviewText: It's toilet paper, okay. I bought this for backpacking and for emergencies. You are paying for convenience. I suppose I could have rolled regular toilet paper around a pencil or something, but this was easier.  Good to have it and not need it, than to need it and not have it.

title: Coleman CPX 6 Rugged XL LED Lantern, 700 Lumens
description: Illuminate any outdoor excursion with the convenient and reliable Coleman CPX 6 Rugged XL LED Lantern. This camping lantern provides 360 degrees of light from LEDs that never need to be replaced, and it runs cool for worry-free use throughout the night. CPX compatibility allows this LED lantern to run on either four D-cell batteries or one CPX 6 rechargeable power cartridge (batteries and cartridges sold separately). With two settings to choose from, this Coleman Lantern produces a beam distance of 40 feet on high (700 lumens) and 20 feet on low (140 lumens). Energy-efficient design delivers up to 60 hours of light on the low setting or 8 hours on the high setting from a single charge. The textured tube reduces glare for a streak-free beam pattern. Impact-resistant and IPX4 water-resistant construction help this rugged lantern survive any adventure, and the large bail handle makes it easy to carry along the way.
reviewText: DO NOT waste your money on this piece of crap. Mine came with rechargeable battery pack which I didn't want-prefer to use 3 or 4 D batteries. No choice here. Well, plugged it in to charge 14 hours like instructions said and battery pack light was green which means fully charged. Charged several hours anyway. Removed plug, turned on and no light. Would light up when plugged in but backwards-low was high and high was low. Then I find out that battery pack to use 4 D batteries is 20 bucks more. This whole deal is insane. Coleman should be ashamed.

title: Coleman Divide Plus Spin 525L LED Lantern
description: The Coleman Divide Plus Spin 525L LED Lantern features a unique twisting design that lets you rotate the entire lantern to easily change modes.Impact-resistant up to 1 m.
reviewText: A totally unusable piece of trash designed by morons. Batteries are utterly impossible to change. Avoid at all costs

title: Coleman 24-Can Party Stacker Portable Cooler
description: You'll be the life of the party when you take along the Coleman 24 Can Party Stacker Cooler to your next event. Not limited to canned drinks, the wide base fits 13 x 9 in. serving dishes, so you can easily pack something for everyone. No matter what you bring, the molded handles will make it easy to get it there. To add even more variety, grab a few coolers in different colors and organize your fun. Use one color to chill the adult drinks, another color for the kids, and keep food warm in yet another, so everyone will know where to find their favorite treats. When the fun is done, the specially designed base fits in the lid of other Party Stacker items, making them simple to stack and store until the next glorious get together.
reviewText: Works great for Sous vide cooking

title: Coleman Northstar Duel Fuel Lantern
description: Carry a bright light with fuel versatility when you pack a Coleman Northstar Dual Fuel InstaStart Lantern. This outdoor companion runs on either Coleman Liquid Fuel or unleaded gasoline. The Dual Fuel design is less expensive to run because it uses less fuel than propane-powered lanterns. It's also more reliable, with better dependability in the coldest conditions. One tank of fuel will power the lantern for up to seven hours on high. Find just the right light with an adjustable knob that allows you to dim the brightness level from its highest at 800 lumens to as low as you need it. This two-mantle lantern is perfect for camping, hunting, tailgating and in cases of emergency.
reviewText: Looks Great ,Built tough however.... I got one about a year ago and mine refused to stop surging, pulsing etc.... I worked with it for hours and couldn't get it dialed in. Researched shows others w same issue. Hopefully Coleman has solved the issue and their now fault free! I hope you get a good one cause this thing is great looking. As for me? I will keep pouting until i get the courage to buy another.......

title: Coleman Camping Coffee Maker
description: Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. reviewText: Love it. The reason for the missing star is because you have to be very carful to not cook it to hot, not melt the plastic and the it takes too long to perk.

title: NCAA 12 Can Soft Sided Cooler
reviewText: Purchased as a gift. Good quality. Great size for a lunch or snacks at the baseball park.

title: Coleman 42-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner & Wheels
description: The Coleman 42-Can Wheeled Soft Cooler goes with you to the campsite, the BBQ, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It features durable wheels and a retractable handle, so it's easy and comfortable to transport to wherever the party is. The cooler is big enough to hold 42 cans, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! The cooler is soft on the outside and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect the contents from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
reviewText: Mediocre construction, but most of all, much smaller than anticipated. I don't know what is meant by 42 cans, but  I would suggest two six packs of soda or beer would be about max here. I wanted capacity as advertised. Not even close. And thus, it returns! - )

title: Coleman SupportRest Elite PillowStop Double-High Airbed
description: Let your guests sleep as wonderfully as they do in their own bed with a Coleman SupportRest Elite Pillow Top Double High Airbed. They'll fall into absolute comfort with the luxurious pillow top. The antimicrobial treated sleep surface resists odor, mold, mildew and fungus from forming on the product, so you can offer a bed to your friends and family with confidence.
reviewText: This mattress inflates in less than five minutes and holds its air amazingly well.  It does lose a small amount of air each night if we use it for consecutive nights, but that is to be expected.  It takes a little over 10 minutes to deflate it and it does not have to be plugged in to do so.  It has held up to 415 pounds nicely and comfortably, and has also held three kids at once sleeping on it.  It is pretty lightweight and easy to put up and take down.  This is a very nice mattress for a very nice price!  We have only used it for indoor "sleepovers" so far to test it out, but there is an outing planned in the near future.  This is a typical trustworthy Coleman product!

title: Coleman Palmetto Cool Weather Adult Sleeping Bag
description: The Coleman Palmetto Sleeping Bag is a rectangular, cool weather sleeping bag made for camping temperatures between 30 and 50 degrees. Perfect for Family camping!.ThermoLock construction reduces heat loss through the zipper, keeping you warmer.ZipperGlide tailoring allows smooth zipper operation around the corners.QuickCord for easy, no tie closure.ComfortCuff surrounds your face with softness.Commercial Machine washable.
reviewText: I'm 5'11" male and it says it's for 5'11" and my shoulders where sticking out of this thing. And I could roll in this thing too tight. More for a child or a woman. We zipped two together and it helped with my wife but it put us on top of each other good for her bad for me.

Edit: this will be our 5th year of useful this tent. I still love it.

I have not tried this tent in a downpour, but it stands up to a drizzle like a boss. It does not come with a  rain fly, but doesn't seem to need one.

The is seriously easy to set up, and almost as easy to take down.  It fits back in the original bag well.

title: Coleman 2000019874 Roadtrip Swaptop Cast Iron Half Griddle
description: Coleman RoadTrip, Swaptop Cast Iron Half Griddle, Porcelain Coated Cast Iron Construction, 142 SQIN Cooking Space, Easy To Clean, Great For Cooking Pancakes, Bacon & More.
reviewText: Porcelain coated and extremely heavy. Not really appropriate for grilling steak. I prefer cast iron. OK for veggies, I guess. If you want to / return it, the container box is way too weak to hold the weight of this behemoth.

title: Coleman Lantern Carry Case
description: Protect your lantern with the Coleman Lantern Carry Case so it'll be ready to go the next time you head outdoors. This tough case helps protect against dents, scratches and broken globes. The base has room for extra mantles and miscellaneous other items. The case latch locks securely and is positioned at the top for easy loading and unloading. Simply let your lantern cool, place it on the base and place the lid on top and lock it, and you're ready to head on to your next adventure.
reviewText: As soon as this is used a few times the clips allow the lamp to fall out the bottom braking the glass.  It has happened to me twice!  I was always very careful since I heard of this happening to other people.  The lamp carry case base fits into the bottom and seems to be a poor design.  Yes, you may buy it and give it a five star review but in a few months it will end up costing you more than you paid.

title: Coleman Fold N Go Propane Stove, 2-Burner
description: An ultra-portable cooking companion for camping trips and picnics, the Coleman Fold N Go Propane Stove, 2-Burner, delivers powerful, consistent heat output for efficient outdoor cooking. This camping stove produces up to 20,000 total BTUs of heat across 2 independently adjustable burners, giving you enough cooking power to prepare hot meals in two 10-inch pans at once. PerfectFlow pressure-control technology delivers steady heat output while cooking, while PerfectHeat technology ensures efficient fuel usage that allows this propane gas stove to last more than an hour with both burners on high on one 16.4 oz. propane cylinder (sold separately). This outdoor stove is also outfitted with an aluminized steel cooktop that resists rust for long-lasting durability. The matchless InstaStart ignition lets you light the stove with the push of a button, and the durable chrome-plated grates are removable for easy cleanups. The Coleman Fold N Go Propane Stove folds up compactly for easy storage and transportation.
reviewText: Kind of a cool idea, but it's really much larger than it needs to be for two burners and seems designed for very large pans that would be more appropriate for car camping.  The design of the "grates" is illogical and lifts the pans much too high above the burners for effective heat transfer.  If Coleman redesigned the grates so they were flush with the top of each section and eliminated all the wasted space, this would be an excellent camping stove for backcountry, biking, motorcycle, or other "keep it simple" applications.  We returned this item.

title: Coleman Deluxe PerfectFlow Propane Lantern
description:
Illuminate your outdoor adventures with the Coleman Deluxe PerfectFlow Propane Lantern. This powerful camping lantern produces 967 lumens of ultra-bright light. You can light the lantern with a quick match strike and dial in the desired brightness level with the adjustable control knob. The footed base keeps the lantern stable when placed on a tabletop or other surface, and the feet on the base collapse for compact storage. Thanks to PerfectFlow pressure-control technology, this propane lantern delivers a steady fuel stream and consistent performance in all kinds of weather. This outdoor lantern uses a 16.4-ounce propane cylinder (sold separately) and lasts 7 hours on the high setting or 13 hours on low. Coleman's Two-Mantle Propane Lantern is as steady as they come. This lantern is pressure-regulated to control fuel flow, so you get consistent light in any temperature. This Coleman propane lantern lights with a match and has a control knob that works like a dimmer switch to let you adjust the brightness and burn time. The porcelain ventilators will prevent rusting and help this lantern last you a long time. This lantern operates on a 16.4-ounce cylinder of Coleman propane (not included), and will burn for up to seven hours on high or 14 hours on low. With a unique, stable base and foldable feet it just doesn't get much more convenient than this. Manufacturer's Warranty

reviewText: THIS LANTERN IS VERY BRIGHT.....I HAVE AN OLDER COLEMAN LANTERN THAT IS NOT VERY BRIGHT ANY MORE.....WORKED ON IT OFTEN AND FINALLY GAVE UP...TO MUCH RUST IN THE FUEL OUT FLOW....THIS IS A GREAT PRODUCT.

This instant shelter features an extending one-piece steel frame with telescoping poles that lock easily into place without pinching. Wide, slanted legs and welded steel feet provide stability on hard surfaces, while steel stakes make it easy to secure the shelter on softer ground. When the party is over, the canopy quickly folds down with a push-button release. The included wheeled bag allows for easy transport and storage. Whether you need a sun shelter for your tailgater or a moisture cover for your backyard BBQ, the Coleman 10-by-10 foot instant shelter is a perfect fit. The slant-leg shelter is sturdy and easy to set up, with a one-piece steel frame that's ready for use in only three minutes. More importantly, the shelter provides 64 square feet of shade, along with a generous center height of 8 feet 10 inches--more than enough for a small gathering. And the shelter is as easy to take down as it is to put up, with Coleman's exclusive pushbutton release levers helping keep your fingers pinch-free. reviewText: This thing broke/collapsed under medium-strength winds on the beach...also, was very hard to get bottoms of poles to come out, and could see that with time, that would have only become more difficult if you use it on the beach and the poles get any sand in them.

title: Coleman 4D Battery Cartridge- CPX6 Compatible
description: Backup Power: Power any Coleman CPX 6 compatible product using 4 D-Cell batteries. Interchangeable: Use one cartridge to power multiple Coleman CPX 6 compatible products. Maximize runtime: No waiting to recharge.
reviewText: it works.  :>)

title: Coleman Stadium Seat
reviewText: Perfect for the stadium. Portable and lightweight. Durable and good color.

title: Coleman 2-Gallon Party Stacker Jug
description: Keep quenched in fun, space-saving style with a Coleman 2 Gallon Party Stacker Jug. The unique stacking design offers vertical storage and use, while its two-gallon capacity is perfect for school parties and family functions. You can even use different colored jugs for different drinks so serving and filling is fast and fun. The removable spigot is easy to clean, and the large bail handle makes carrying easy.Brand: ColemanModel: 3000000736Color: BlueMaterials: PlasticDimensions: 7 inches long x 8 inches wide x 9 inches highConvenient stackable design for multiple beveragesSecure storage and easy-to-clean spigotThis item is not able to be shipped internationally or to a freight forwarding address.
reviewText: I was not expecting much from this just needed a water jug that the kids could use on their own. However it surprised me. Easy for kids to use, easy clean up because the spout unscrews and keep thing's cold.

title: Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Grill Case for LX Series Grills
description: Add even more portability to your Coleman RoadTrip LX Series Grill when you pack it inside a Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Case. This heavy-duty, weather-resistant case includes easy-glide wheels for more mobility and top and side handles for better control. A durable zipper and inner straps secure the grill the entire trip, and inside pockets fit accessories and condiments for whatever meal youre planning to cook up.
reviewText: Very small and hard to put over the grill.

title: Coleman Guide Series Powerhouse Dual Fuel Stove
description: Cook breakfast, lunch and dinner for the entire camp in any weather on the Coleman Guide Series Powerhouse Dual Fuel Stove. The cooking surface offers plenty of room for a 12-in. and 10-in. pan to simultaneously sit above two Band-a-Blu burners that deliver a total 17,000 BTUs of cooking power. With Dual Fuel Technology, which gives you the option of using Coleman Liquid Fuel or unleaded gasoline, you can take less fuel with you to save money and packing space. WindBlock panels help shield your flame from wind and can adjust in and out to fit various pan sizes. When the meal is over, the chrome-plated grate removes for simple and quick cleanup.
reviewText:
I bought this stove because the design is tried and true. My grandfather own one just like it, although better built in sure. The other reason I bought this is because I can use white fuel or gasoline.... I don't like carried all the bottles.

That being said I at first had trouble getting the burners to burn a true blue. If I only had one burner going the flame would be a bright yellow. I guess the stove need a little breaking in because now it fires right up and runs like a champ.

title: Coleman Dunnock Cold Weather Adult Sleeping Bag
description: Ideal for camping at higher altitudes or in cooler months, the Coleman Dunnock Cold-Weather Sleeping Bag helps you sleep comfortably in temperatures as low as 20F. This sleeping bag features Fiberlock construction that keeps the insulation from shifting, reducing cold spots and increasing durability. A cotton cover and ultra-soft cotton flannel liner also keep you warm, as well as a Thermolock draft tube that prevents heat loss through the zipper. The bottom of the bag unzips to provide extra ventilation on warmer nights. The 2-way patented ZipPlow system plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. Plus, the Roll Control design and Wrap 'N' Roll integrated packing system make this lightweight backpacking sleeping bag easy to roll and pack. This sleeping bag has a spacious design that can accommodate most people up to 5 feet 11 inches tall and is machine washable for easy cleaning.
reviewText: Nothing used for cold weather should be cotten.  You want poly or down fill.  I'm not saying it's not a comfortable bag and will be fine for a cool weather camping..but you are risking a good nights sleep if you use this for cold weather camping.

title: Coleman Stove Carry Case, Black - 2000020971
description: Add even more portability to your Coleman stove when you pack it in a durable Coleman Stove Carry Case. This heavy-duty vinyl case protects the stove while you're storing it and transporting it. The bag's strong, easy-carry handles and durable zipper secure the stove during transport, and two storage pouches keep standard 16.4-oz. propane cylinders close.
reviewText: It's not even been a year and this bag is torn.  I would not recommend it.  I have used this bag maybe 6 times.  Very disappointed for a Coleman product.

title: Coleman RoadTrip Grill Light
description: Shed some light on your grill with the Coleman RoadTrip Grill Light. The Grill Light-Inchs universal clamp attaches to any surface up to 1.25-Inch thick -- including all Coleman RoadTrip Grills. It features a long-lasting 1-watt LED light, so you can easily grill in the dark -- or use the light wherever you need a small, portable light source. The Grill Light features High and Low settings for convenience. It-Inchs weather-resistant, so it-Inchs great for outdoor use, and has a flexible 16-Inch chrome-plated steel arm that can be directed wherever you need some illumination. The Grill Light runs on three AAA batteries (included) and carries a 1-year warranty.
reviewText: So far, it is very good. Very bright. Only used it acouple times. Time will tell if it deserves a 5 star. Worry a bit about rain damage.

title: Coleman Micro Packer LED Lantern, 100 L
description: Grab a lantern and a flashlight in the palm of your hand with the Coleman MicroPacker LED Lantern. The bright, 2-in-1 design snaps from area lighting to directional lighting quite literally in a snap. The bright LED lasts a lifetime, so it never needs to be replaced. The versatile light lasts up to 92 hours, and an extremely lightweight design is only 6 oz.-even with the three AA-cell batteries that power the lantern.
reviewText: I have used this camping a few times now and it does a decent job of producing light for our tent.  I suggest reading all the specs as this is much smaller than I anticipated.  I bought one of the old version too and this is brighter (non-scientific based on trying to read using each to measure light).  You would not want to rely on this for camp site light.  For what you get and the price this is okay and I'm happy with my purchase 3.5 stars.

title: Coleman Rest Easy Camp Pad
description: Get a good night's rest with the Coleman Rest Easy Camp Pad. The closed cell foam protects you from uncomfortable surfaces and helps insulate you from the cold ground.
reviewText: Just go to the store and buy some foam. Basically that's all that's to this! Not worth it.

title: Coleman Bottle Top Propane Stove,Green,6.62" H x 7.81" W x 7.75" L
description:
Need a lightweight outdoor stove for backpacking, hunting, or camping? Look no further than the Coleman Portable Bottle-Top Propane Stove, which fits up to an 8-inch pan above a fully adjustable burner for precise temperature control and up to 10,000 BTUs of cooking power. Brew coffee, heat up hot dogs, and so on, knowing you can enjoy up to 2.5 hours of cooking on just one 16.4 oz. propane cylinder (sold separately). PerfectFlow technology keeps that heat steady, even in extreme conditions, and a large base offers stability for easy stirring. When its time to break down the campsite and fit all your gear into a crowded pack, youll be relieved to know that the burner and base separate from the propane cylinder for truly compact packing. Rest assured your ultra-portable stove comes with a 3-year limited warranty. The Coleman 5431A700 One-burner Propane Stove is an easy-to-use portable stove that should meet almost any camp cooking need. The PerfectFlow regulator provides consistent cooking performance by producing a steady fuel stream, even in cold weather, high altitudes, or when fuel is low. Equipped with one 10,000 BTU burner, this fully adjustable stove will last for 2.2 hours on high or up to nine hours on low. The pot supports help shield your cooking flame from the wind, while the large eight-inch burner bowl should fit most any pot. This Coleman one-burner stove can boil a quart of water in just four minutes! This stove operates on one 16.4-ounce cylinder of Coleman propane (not included). Manufacturer Warranty
Limited lifetime warranty
reviewText: Heavier than anticipated and too bulky for backpacking, but works like a charm.  Since I need a cooking/heat source for my car emergency kit, I am keeping it.  Weight isn't a big issue while riding in my car trunk.

title: Coleman Folding Saw
description: Pack a smaller, lighter, safer cutting tool the next time you're camping, backpacking or hiking with a Coleman Folding Saw. The sure-grip handle prevents injuries and the locking steel blade cuts through wood, plastic pipe, plywood, wallboard and animal bone on every stroke, forward and back. When you're done, the blade folds safely into the handle. It's also perfect for around the home to prune and trim around the yard.
reviewText:
Purchased for camping and I love fires so it got a lot of use on deadwood. Props to the blade - stayed sharp until the last cut.

-2 stars - metal is flimsy and bends. Many times I had to step on the blade or put it in a vice to get it straight again, guess I was sawing too hard.

-2 stars - I was topping a tree I didn't like on my property with this saw. Figured it was safer than pulling up a 15lb Stihl MS362 and it shattered... like literally the bolt shattered cutting a 3" diameter branch. And I'm not one to search the isles at a regular store only to buy more chinese junk. So I gotta wait a couple days to get the next saw with a 1/2 topped tree - my neighbors probably think I'm crazy and actually wanted it pruned that way. Pic is of the tree before topping.

Imo, if you cut occasionally get the corona. If you love cutting by hand get a silky. For the rest of us probably get a corona for occasional use combined with the milwaukee m18 hackzall - pruning will be fun again, because everything is fun with power tools. I got the silky fixed blade for up in trees working with ropes and such.

title: Coleman Compass with LED Light
description: You'll always know where you're going with help from a Coleman Compass with LED Light. The compass is liquid-filled for quicker accuracy and shows eight directional reference points: N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W and NW. The push-button LED gives backlight to the compass face and extra lighting on the trail. A rotating bezel allows users to mark the compass in two-degree increments and a special kidney-shape design allows for a more comfortable grip. The compass includes a neck lanyard for hands-free use and operates on a single replaceable coin cell battery (included).
reviewText: I get a different reading every time I look at it. It is very untrustworthy.

title: Coleman Tent Kit
description: Set up the tent quickly with the steel tent pegs and rubber mallet. Keep it clean for the entire campout with the nesting hand broom and dustpan. When the fun is done, use the tent stake puller to get the pegs out of the ground easily. All four of these important tools fit nicely inside the mesh carry bag for the next adventure.
reviewText: I got this when I purchased my Coleman 4-person instant tent with a special offer that got me this product for free. I don't think I would have purchased this product otherwise but the mallet is solid and the tent stakes are tough although the plastic heads  (if you could call it that) are a bit weak but they have worked well so far.

title: Coleman Replacement Tent Pole Kit
description: It includes four 27-in. fiberglass replacement poles that attach to one another, allowing you to adjust the new pole to the perfect length.
reviewText: Poles were too narrow in diameter compared to my original ones.

title: Coleman Company Stearns Comfort Series Personal Floatation Device
description: Carry your tackle, boat keys, or other gear with you in a Stearns Comfort Series Life Vest. A front pocket allows anglers and hunters quick access to their gear. The US Coast Guard approved life vest is designed to help cool you on a hot day, with mesh on the back and shoulders for radded ventilation. The large arm holes also add comfort to a day on the water, giving you more room to paddle, cast or aim. A zippered front and webbed adjustable buckle strap offers a custom fit. With a durable 200D nylon shell and tough Flotation Foam inside, you're sure to be wearing it when you catch your limit more times than you can count.
reviewText: Great fit, was $69.95 at Walmart.

title: Coleman Camp Propane Grill/Stove+
description: The Coleman Camp Propane Grill/Stove+ offers both a grill and a stove for versatile campsite cooking. This durable steel-crafted outdoor appliance has a stove surface that fits a 10-inch pan as well as a 130-square inch grill area, letting you saut veggies while you're grilling chicken, or get the soup going while you're cooking up burgers. Each surface has independent temperature controls to give you precise control. The InstaStart push-button ignition powers up the portable grill with a simple press of a button with no matches needed, while integrated Wind Block panels help shield the flame from wind and can be folded down on calm days to be used as side tables. This outdoor grill features PerfectFlow pressure control technology to keep the heat steady even in extreme conditions and PerfectHeat technology for more efficient cooking with less fuel. An aluminized steel cooktop offers durable use and is rust resistant, and the removable grates and grease management tray offer simple and quick cleanup. The Coleman Camp Propane Grill/Stove+ can run for up to one hour with both burners on high setting on one 16.4-ounce propane cylinder (sold separately) and produces 20,000 total BTUs of cooking power.
reviewText: this is the worst camp stove i have ever purchased, and i have bought a lot of stoves, so i have a great background on out door camping.  this stove slides around on table, and the cook ware also slips and slides, takes for ever to heat coffee water and goes through gas super quick. cooked one meal on 1 tank of gas, this was an easy meal without a long cooking time, next day heated up soup and made coffee and fried sausages and went through another tank of gas.  replaced this stove with a camp chef combo stove and oven. love it and purchased another one for our cabin

title: Coleman Hooligan Backpacking Tent
description: The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..
reviewText:
I would say it is OK as a tent. Where the trouble starts is that there is no single replacement pole set for this tent, Coleman advertises one, but it isn't one. By the time you get everything you need you will have 2/3 of what a new one will cost you invested in multiple pole sets and shipping.
IF you buy the "Replacement pole set" not the "Replacement/repair set" or if you buy either of them for that matter you will not have what you need to replace the pole. When you look up the parts they do not tell you anywhere that the replacement pole set is eight sections and the original pole set is nine.. You would think they would throw in the extra piece of fiberglass pole so a person could make a new pole to replace a lost one.
When I inquired I was told I would have to order another  replacement pole set to get what was needed.
This was not a mistake.
The  pole for a Hooligan II is 173 inches long the replacement is advertised at 150. It was never intended to be a replacement pole.
I wonder how many other people went to the parts list and bought a replacement only to find out it was  too short by design.
Several e-mails to Coleman asking them to review their policy and description or definition of "Replacement Pole set" have gone unanswered.
One more piece would make it whole, but instead they make you buy another 8 piece set to add to the 'Replacement pole set" to make a replacement pole.
Too many tents to choose from out there to buy one a person can't get parts for.
Thanks

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText:
Finally tested the tent at our backyard. It's huge! It also rained, and it has some drops of water leaked at the edges. Not too bad considering the price we paid for. It look like we may have pulled it a little too tight, not a major problem. Maybe some water proofing spray would improve it.

Not too difficult to put up, even for the 1st time.

title: Coleman Rest Easy Camp Pad
description: Get a good night's rest with the Coleman Rest Easy Camp Pad. The closed cell foam protects you from uncomfortable surfaces and helps insulate you from the cold ground.
reviewText: It'll work but the texture is not at all what I expected or wanted

title: Coleman Adjustable Comfort 30 Degree Sleeping Bag
reviewText: I thought this was such a great idea. Disappointed with the material fort sheet and the way it affected to the bag. I don't like feeling the zipper across my torso. Kind of lets the cold in.

title: Coleman Premium Dual Fuel Lantern with Hard Carry Case
description: Carry a bright light with fuel versatility when you pack a Coleman Premium Dual Fuel Lantern with hard carry case. This outdoor companion runs on either Coleman Liquid Fuel or unleaded gasoline. The Dual Fuel design is less expensive to run, because it uses less fuel than propane-powered lanterns. It's also more reliable, with better dependability in the coldest conditions. One tank of fuel will power the lantern for up to seven hours on high. Find just the right light with an adjustable knob that allows you to dim the brightness level from its highest at 700 lumens to as low as you need it. This two-mantle lantern is perfect for camping, hunting, tailgating and in cases of emergency. It includes a 3-year limited warranty.
reviewText: LIght, heat in the winter.  Easy to operate. Cheap solution to losing the power, runs for 9+ hours on one filling of Coleman fuel.  Good addition to anyone's Bug Out Kit too.

title: Coleman Rechargeable QuickPump Unit
description:
Bring your Coleman Rechargeable QuickPump Unit on your trip and inflate your air mattress at lightning speedwell, almost. More like two minutes. This handy pump inflates products that feature Coleman's Double Lock Valves, Boston valves, and, with adapters (included), pinch valves. Use the re-charger to re-juice the QuickPump whenever you're near an outlet.

Product Features
  • Material:

reviewText: Makes blowing up and deflating air mattresses a breeze.  I was skeptical of some of the reviews that said it failed on them, but mine has been working great.

title: Coleman Dunk Bag
description: Make dish storage easy with a Coleman Dunk Bag. This breathable, multi-use bag is also designed to conveniently carry and store beach gear, bath toys or laundry. Constructed of mildew- and rot-resistant fabric, count on this bag to be with you trip after trip.
reviewText: This is great to cover my park city grill - keeps the water out

title: Coleman Pack-Away Camping Cot
description: Bring along a perfect relaxation spot on your next camping trip with the Coleman Pack-Away Camping Cot. Ideal for sitting, reclining, and sleeping, this versatile camping cot features an extra-wide design that provides ample resting room. It also comes equipped with a convenient removable side table with a cup holder, where you can easily keep drinks, magazines, and other personal items. The steel frame can support up to 300 pounds and is built to withstand season after season of rugged use. Thanks to its folding, portable design and included carry bag, this camping cot fits inside most car trunks and is easy to transport. The Coleman Pack-Away Camping Cot accommodates most people up to 6 feet 6 inches tall.
reviewText: Bought it for camping but used it on a boy's weekend trip.  It was firm and comfy.  Used a sleeping bag and had 2 pillows, and I slept very well the whole weekend.  It is quick and easy to setup and break down.  Everything fits right back into the carrying case.

title: Coleman 333264 Propane Fuel Pressurized Cylinder, 16.4 Oz
description: Coleman 333264 Propane Fuel Pressurized Cylinder, 16 Oz
reviewText: Wrong size for price.  Should include 50 oz instead of 16.

title: Coleman Youth Self-Inflating Camp Pad
description: Pack compact nighttime comfort and support when you have a Coleman Self-Inflating Camp Pad. Just roll it out and open the free-flow valve-the pad will automatically inflate itself. You can count on the durable, weather-resistant nylon shell to hold up night after night. When the fun is done, just open up the valve, push out the air as you roll it up, squeeze out what's left with the compression straps and throw it in the trunk with the rest of your gear.
reviewText: Terrible, very thin and honestly you would not feel the difference using this or just sleeping on the floor, so why bother with this.

title: Coleman Xtreme Cooler, 28-Quart, Dark Gray/Orange/Light Gray Overmold
description: Keep your food and drinks cold for an extended time, and make the fun last longer, when you bring a Coleman 28 Quart Xtreme Cooler. Xtreme technology uses an insulated lid and extra insulation in the walls to keep your items cold for up to 3 days. Large enough to hold 36 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for the entire party. Whether you're headed on a long weekend camping trip, a roadtrip, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip no-crush handles make getting to your destination easy and comfortable. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax, and the cup holders molded into the lid will keep your cold drink close while you enjoy the day.
reviewText: It's a good cooler for an afternoon or tailgate . . . I wanted a spigot instead of a drain plug, and it would work as a water cooler as well . . . and I could carry it in my truck for ice water on the job sites . . .

title: Coleman Seam Sealer
description: Stop the rain from dripping through your tent seams with help from a Coleman Seam Sealer. The built-in applicator pad allows you to work the fast-drying, water-based formula into seams and corners to permanently close small holes on tents and other outdoor gear.
reviewText: not too efficient on my pop up canvas/gona make my own with 100% silicone and mineral spirits 1/1

title: Coleman Carlsbad Tent with Screen Room
description: Sleep in after the sun rises or put the kids to bed early while the sun is still up with a Coleman Carlsbad Fast Pitch Dome Tent with Screen Room. The Dark Room technology on this tent blocks 90% of sunlight to keep the tent darker if you want to sleep while the sun is up, and it also reduces how much the tent heats up during the day by up to 11.4%.
reviewText:
I will start by saying that the design for this tent (I got the 4 person) is pretty good. It took about 15 minutes for 2 people to setup which isn't bad but not that great either,  I believe the 6-person version is adverted as fast pitch while the 4 person is conventional. The screen room does a good job of keeping bugs and dirt out of the main tent although only the middle portion has a rain cover, the sides and front will get wet if it rains.

Now for the reason I bought the tent, the "DarkRoom" Feature. Coleman advertises on their site that the "he Dark Room technology on this tent blocks 97.5% of sunlight." I find this to be extremely misleading. I believe that the darkroom material/coating does block nearly all sunlight however they only made the rain-fly and windows out of that material! The sides of the tent are made form normal tent material that lets in a lot of light. To me this tent is darker than a normal one but only slightly. If I would have known that the tent was not entirely made of the darkroom material I would not have bought it.

Recap: It is a decent overall but I would not buy for the Darkroom feature. Coleman, please make a tent entirely out of this material!

title: Coleman WeatherMaster 6-Person Tent with Screen Room
description:
Watch nature unfold before your eyes in Coleman WeatherMaster 6-Person Tent with Screen Room. During the day, the screen room lets you enjoy the great outdoors away from bugs and can be used on warmer nights for extra sleeping space. If it rains, this tent keeps you dry thanks to WeatherTec technology, which uses a tub-like floor with patented corner welds, protected seams, and a covered zipper to help keep water out. Meanwhile, the strong frame is tested to withstand 35+ mph winds. Additionally, an angled window keeps rain out while allowing for extra air circulation. A hinged door makes for easy coming and going. Setup is simple with snag-free, continuous pole sleeves and a patented pin-and-ring system. Inside, there's enough room to stretch out on 2 queen-size airbeds, and storage pockets keep small items organized and off the floor. When it's time to head home, the tent easily packs up into an expandable carry bag with a rip strip for extra storage until you're off on your next adventure.


A patent-pending hinged door provides easy entry and exit, and a touch of at-home convenience.
The Coleman WeatherMaster 6 Tent has two rooms and plenty of space for the entire family. Up to six campers can sleep easily inside thanks to the 17-by-nine (W x D) footprint and 6 ft. 10 in. center height. Two doors�including a patent-pending hinged front door�offer easy in-and-out. An additional floor-less screened room provides extra ventilation on warm days, a great place for meals and gathering, rain or shine, and protected storage space. Coleman's Comfort System allows excellent ventilation control via Variflow adjustable airflow, a vented Cool-Air privacy Port, privacy vent window, and all-mesh ceiling. A convenient electrical access port lets you run a cord from your device in the tent to an outside power source, while an interior gear pocket helps you keep things organized. Setup is quick and simple thanks two color-coded poles and continuous pole sleeves, shock-corded fiberglass poles, an exclusive pin-and-ring design, and InstaClip attachments. Straightforward instructions are sewn into the convenient carry bag, and separate stake and pole bags are also included. Coleman's WeatherTec System
This proprietary series of interworking features keeps the weather where it belongs�outside the tent�at all times.
  • Leak-free Seams: In addition to fully-taped rainfly seams, the rainfly covers doors and windows, and incorporates easy-to-use Velcro frame attachments
  • Weather-resistant Fabric: Coated polyester fabric combined with anti-wicking thread, webbing, and zippers are designed to keep you dry
  • Protected Seams: Inverted floor seams dramatically increase weather resistance by hiding needle holes inside the tent, away from the elements
  • Waterproof Floors: Welding technology strengthens the tent floor and eliminates needle holes
  • Zipper Protection: Zipper cuff adds protection from the elements to the door
  • Wind Strong Frame: Engineered to be a stronger, more wind-responsive frame by using redesigned poles and guy-out triangles to anchor tents and increase performance
Specifications
  • 75-denier polyester taffeta fly
  • 68-denier polyester mesh inner tent
  • 1,000-denier polyethylene floor
  • 19-millimeter steel poles
The Coleman Limited Warranty
Coleman has been in business for more than 100 years, and continues to produce high-quality, affordable tents, lanterns, table-top stoves, and more. All Coleman products have a warranty against defects in material and workmanship, and the WeatherMaster 6 Tent includes a limited one-year manufacturer's warranty. About Coleman Outdoor Products
More than 100 years ago, an entrepreneurial young man named W.C. Coleman had an idea for manufacturing better lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. A century later, Coleman's current catalog features a wide-ranging array of products that make spending time outside a pleasure. The company crafts coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days, airbeds that are comfortable and won't deflate during the night, a complete line of bright and long-lasting LED lights, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and more.
reviewText: I'm not giving it a HORRIBLE review, just being honest. It's just not the right tent for me. I find it pretty cumbersome to put up and not as weatherproof as I would like. It seems to leak quite a bit around the seams and I believe that the setup is a little more "clunky" than what it needs to be. A lot of tents area "somewhat" self standing while you're putting it up. This one doesn't seem to be. I think a one man setup job IS possible, but, two makes it much better. I like a tent that I could put up myself, without having to wait for my hubby, if need be. It's an okay tent, but if you want ease or better weatherproofing, look elsewhere.

title: Coleman #21 Instaclip Mantles: 2-Pack, Model 21B132C
description:
It only takes a few moments to get clear white light with Coleman Insta-Clip 2 #21 Mantles. All you have to do is remove the old mantles, slip the new mantle(s) onto the burner tube(s) and then pull the tab.

Coleman #21 Instaclip Mantles

Keep your lantern shining with Coleman's Instaclip Mantles. Thanks to Coleman's patented Instaclip tab mantle installation is simple and easy--with no more strings to tie or wires to twist. Simply slip the mantle over the burn tube and pull the tab away. The mantle instantly secures itself and your lantern shines on. Fits Coleman lantern models: 200, 201, 214, 220, 275, 282, 286, 290, 295, 5107, 5114, 5150 5152, 5153, 5154, 5155, 5156, 5157, 5159, 9950 and 9960
reviewText:
In my experience, these are harder to deal with than the tie ones. By the time you mess with the wire, shaping it to fit, having the clip fall off, and stabbing your fingers on the wire, it's a pain.

Just buy the tie ones. Takes literally half the time to tie them on than it does to mess with this on my Dual fuel lanterns.

title: Coleman Fuel Filler
description: Avoid the mess of spilling your Coleman Liquid Fuel with help from a Coleman Fuel Filler. This attachment simply screws onto any Coleman Liquid Fuel can spout and acts as a funnel to the appliance.
reviewText: Works as expected!

title: Coleman 30-Can Insulated Soft Cooler with 24-Hour Ice Retention, Red/Black
description: Keep your food and drinks cold for an extended time when you bring the Coleman 30-Can Insulated Soft Cooler with 24-Hour Ice Retention to the park or the campsite. The zippered main compartment seals in the cold with extra insulation, keeping ice up to 24 hours in temps as high as 90F, while a front pocket lets you store extra snacks. No matter where you go or what extras you bring, an adjustable shoulder strap makes hands-free carrying possible, and large side handles allow for more control when the cooler is fully loaded. After you've reached the perfect spot, the top hatch offers easy access to an ice-cold drink. The antimicrobial-treated liner resists odor, mold, mildew, and fungus from forming so the cooler is easier to clean between each adventure.
reviewText: Certainly not 24 hour.  Put a few beers in with some ice and left it inside my air conditioned home for the day, and when I got home from work, ice was melted and beer wasn't super cold.  Size is good.  Just don't expect 24 hour cooling.

title: Coleman Divide Plus Spin 525L LED Lantern
description: The Coleman Divide Plus Spin 525L LED Lantern features a unique twisting design that lets you rotate the entire lantern to easily change modes.Impact-resistant up to 1 m.
reviewText:
The Divide + Spin is a solid-enough lantern once you get it set up. However, inserting the batteries and closing the cover can be challenging. Maybe you will luck into closing it correctly on the first try. Or maybe you will struggle with it for 15 minutes like I did. I tried to follow the instructions but failed at "aligning the post and side tabs."  Align tabs with what? Are the release tabs the same as side tabs? It would help if Coleman would mark these with yellow. Also, I had to use a little force to close this, which I was hesitant to do.

Don't wait until you are sitting by a campfire to put this together! You need light to find the tabs, plus you need to see how to insert the 4 D batteries.

The lantern is held in the package with a very strong cord so I recommend scissors. Once this is set up, it seems like a good lantern. Not terribly bright but it will light your picnic table, and it is adjustable. To save batteries, turn the bottom so the red areas are visible. Turn it back when you want to use it.

title: COLEMAN 3-Piece Nylon Serving Set
description: Serve up your outdoor meals with the ease of the ColemanAr 3-Piece Nylon Serving Set. The durable, lightweight spoon, slotted spoon, and spatula won_Tt scratch your coated cookware, and a metal ring holds them all together for outdoor organization. When the fun is done, they clean up easily under water or in the dishwasher.
reviewText: Better than I thought they'd be.  Only used for camping, but could be easily used in the kitchen everyday.  5 stars, because this is mandatory when cooking for four people out in the woods!

title: Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium
description: Take your Coleman stove wherever outdoor adventures lead you with the Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium. Designed to fit Coleman 2-burner stoves measuring up to 21.5 x 14 x 4.8 inches, this rugged carry case made from PVC-coated polyester protects your stove during transportation and storage. Strong web handles provide comfort when toting stoves between campsites, while the durable zipper is designed to keep stoves safe and dry. Two propane pouches with drawstrings securely carry extra fuel canisters (sold separately).
reviewText: I read carefully based on other reviews and got the item that fits my new Coleman PerfectFlow Insta Start Propane Grill.  Haven't used it on a camping trip yet but it's also great for storage in the garage and will fit easily into the car for the next camping trip!

title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
reviewText: Amazing, love the portability!!! sugguestion is to season your grills prior to cooking on them...grease and bake for a bit....will help with nonstick.

title: Coleman Camp Oven
description:
Bring the joy of fresh-baked muffins, cinnamon rolls, cornbread, and other treats to any campsite with the Coleman Camp Oven. Designed to fit neatly on Coleman propane and liquid fuel camp stoves, this portable oven gives you the ability to bake treats or keep food warm while spending time outdoors. The included interior rack adjusts to 3 heights, while the easy-to-read thermometer lets you bake with confidence. This portable oven is made from smooth aluminized steel that resists corrosion and scratches and wipes clean easily, and it folds flat for convenient carrying and storage when its time to pack up camp. Camping stoves and other cooking accessories have made it possible to cook most things outdoors, but baked goods have always been out of the question. Until now, that is. Made of smooth aluminized steel, the Coleman camping oven lets you bake a batch of muffins, biscuits, or rolls right at the campsite.


The Coleman camping oven is designed to sit on a two- or three-burner camping stove.
The oven doesn't require electric or gas power to work. Instead, campers simply place the oven on top of a Coleman two- or three-burner stove, which provides all the heat you need to bake your favorite dishes. The oven also offers such baking essentials as an adjustable steel bake rack and an easy-to-read thermometer. And when you're done baking, the oven folds flat for easy storage. Made in China, the Coleman camping oven measures 12 by 12 by 12 inches (W x H x D) when standing and weighs 7 pounds. About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
reviewText: Burned everything I tried to "bake" in this.  There should be some sort of diffuser on the bottom since it burns the crap out of anything placed in it.

title: Coleman Quad LED Lantern Special Edition Ultra Bright 190 Lumens, Red
description:
Take the convenience of four lights in one with you with the Coleman Quad LED Lantern. Together the lantern shines 190 ultra-bright lumens for up to 75 hours. During an emergency, pop one of the four lights off the base for a personal flashlight. They recharge once theyre back on the base for hands-free light. The 24 LEDs last a lifetime, so they never need replacing and the lantern runs cool so its always safe to touch, even when its been on for hours. Combining an area light with four portable lanterns in a single clever unit, the Coleman LED Quad lantern is a versatile choice for indoor or outdoor use. The Quad is equipped with four removable LED panels that hold 24 LED lights total. Users can remove any of the four panels and use them independently, such as when needing a portable light for the bathroom or tent, or they can keep all four attached to the lantern and produce 190 total lumens of light. As a result, the Quad is the perfect light for group camping trips and any other occasion where folks might splinter off into smaller groups during the night. Each of the panels is a fully functioning light, with six 5mm white LEDs, a rechargeable NiMH battery, an independent on/off switch, and a top handle for carrying or hanging. The NiMH battery--which recharges when stored in the lantern base--provides up to 1.5 hours of light on its own. The lantern base, meanwhile, requires eight D-cell batteries (not included), which provide an approximate run time of 75 hours for the entire lantern. Other features include a main on/off switch located on top of the lantern, a light range of 26 feet, and a limited five-year warranty. About Coleman
